dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.2.7 Acceptance Criteria </h3><div class="relative w-full group/table mb-5"><div class="overflow-x-auto relative w-full scrollbar-hidden"><table class="min-w-full text-sm text-left text-gray-500 w-fit dark:text-gray-400"><thead class="text-gray-700 uppercase border-none dark:text-gray-400"><tr class="border-none bg-[#f7f7f7] dark:bg-[#F7F7F70F]"><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">ID</div></div> </th><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">Criterion</div></div> </th><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">Verification</div></div> </th></tr></thead> <tbody><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">D-AC001</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Dog moves with visible momentum; no instant direction changes at speed.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Visual inspection; velocity curve analysis.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">D-AC002</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Dog commits to obstacles at appropriate distance based on speed and breed.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Automated test: verify commitment distance within 0.5m of breed spec.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">D-AC003</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Dog responds to correctly-timed commands within 200ms.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Automated test: measure response time.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">D-AC004</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Breed differences are noticeable in gameplay.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">A/B test: players can distinguish breeds by behavior.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">D-AC005</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Dog recovers from unclear state within 5 seconds of correct handler input.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Manual test: create confusion, verify recovery.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">D-AC006</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Dog AI decision cycle does not exceed 16ms.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Profiler verification.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">D-AC007</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Dog state debug visualization is accurate.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Visual debug + manual verification.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">D-AC008</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Dog behavior is deterministic for replay.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Automated test: run same inputs twice, verify identical output.</td> dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.3 Obstacles and Course Authoring System </h2><h3 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.3.1 Overview </h3><p dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">The obstacle and course authoring system defines the physical and logical elements that form agility courses. The system must support: </p><ul dir="auto"><li class="text-start"> All standard agility obstacle types</li><li class="text-start"> Course layout authoring</li><li class="text-start"> Obstacle sequence definition</li><li class="text-start"> Validation of course legality</li><li class="text-start"> Runtime obstacle affordances for dog AI</li> </ul><div class=""></div><hr class="border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#EBEBEB]/16"><h3 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.3.2 User Stories </h3><div class="relative w-full group/table mb-5"><div class="overflow-x-auto relative w-full scrollbar-hidden"><table class="min-w-full text-sm text-left text-gray-500 w-fit dark:text-gray-400"><thead class="text-gray-700 uppercase border-none dark:text-gray-400"><tr class="border-none bg-[#f7f7f7] dark:bg-[#F7F7F70F]"><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">ID</div></div> </th><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">User Story</div></div> </th></tr></thead> <tbody><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">O-001</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a designer, I want to place obstacles on a course canvas so I can create course layouts.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">O-002</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a designer, I want to define the required obstacle sequence so the game can evaluate faults.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">O-003</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a designer, I want to validate course legality so players don't encounter impossible sequences.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">O-004</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want obstacles to be visually distinct so I can identify them during gameplay.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">O-005</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want contact obstacles to have visible contact zones so I can understand fault calls.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">O-006</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want weave poles to be clearly numbered so I know entry direction.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">O-007</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a designer, I want to tune obstacle parameters (height, spacing) so I can adjust difficulty.</td> </tr></tbody></table></div> <button class="absolute top-1 right-1 z-10 p-1.5 rounded-lg bg-[#f7f7f7] dark:bg-[#272A2F] hover:bg-[#E5E5E5] dark:hover:bg-[#272A2F] opacity-0 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.3.3 Functional Requirements </h3><h4 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.3.3.1 Obstacle Types </h4><div class="relative w-full group/table mb-5"><div class="overflow-x-auto relative w-full scrollbar-hidden"><table class="min-w-full text-sm text-left text-gray-500 w-fit dark:text-gray-400"><thead class="text-gray-700 uppercase border-none dark:text-gray-400"><tr class="border-none bg-[#f7f7f7] dark:bg-[#F7F7F70F]"><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">ID</div></div> </th><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">Requirement</div></div> </th><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">Priority</div></div> </th></tr></thead> <tbody><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">O-F001</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">System must support the following obstacle types: A-Frame, Dog Walk, Teeter, Tunnel (open and chute), Weave Poles (6 and 12 pole sets), Pause Table, Bar Jump, Tire Jump, Broad Jump, Wall Jump.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">P0</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">O-F002</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Each obstacle type must have a unique identifier, visual prefab, collision geometry, and affordance data.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">P0</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">O-F003</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Contact obstacles (A-Frame, Dog Walk, Teeter) must have defined contact zones with visual and logical presence.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">P0</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">O-F004</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Weave poles must support configurable pole count (standard: 6 or 12) and spacing (standard: 24 inches).</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">P0</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">O-F005</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Tunnels must support straight and curved variants with configurable bend angle.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">P1</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">O-F006</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Jumps must support configurable height (based on dog height division).</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">P0</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border null">O-AC002</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Course validation correctly identifies all error conditions.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Automated test suite with invalid course definitions.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">O-AC003</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Instrumented test on minimum spec hardware.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: affordances correctly guide dog AI.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Dog AI test: verify dog approaches obstacles correctly.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">O-AC005</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Sequence faults are correctly detected during gameplay.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Test runs with intentional wrong-course actions.</td> </tr><tr dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.4 Timing, Scoring, and Fault Adjudication System </h2><h3 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.4.1 Overview </h3><p dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">The scoring system provides authentic agility competition adjudication. It tracks time, evaluates faults, and produces final scores. The system must be authoritative, transparent, and aligned with real-world agility rules while providing clear feedback to players. </p><div class=""></div><hr class="border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#EBEBEB]/16"><h3 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.4.2 User Stories </h3><div class="relative w-full group/table mb-5"><div class="overflow-x-auto relative w-full want accurate run timing so my performance is measured correctly.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">S-002</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want clear fault calls so I understand what went wrong.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">S-003</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want to see my split times so I can analyze my run.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">S-004</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want the scoring system to match real agility rules so the game feels authentic.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">S-005</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want to see fault replays so I can learn from mistakes.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">S-006</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want time faults calculated correctly so course times are meaningful.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">S-007</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: class="min-w-full text-sm text-left text-gray-500 w-fit dark:text-gray-400"><thead class="text-gray-700 uppercase border-none dark:text-gray-400"><tr class="border-none bg-[#f7f7f7] dark:bg-[#F7F7F70F]"><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">ID</div></div> </th><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">Requirement</div></div> </th><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">Priority</div></div> </th></tr></thead> <tbody><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">S-F010</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">System must detect and score the following fault types: Refusal/Run-out, Wrong Course, Missed Contact, Table Fault, Bar Knock, Exceeded Time Limit, Handler Contact with Dog, Handler Contact with Obstacle.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">P0</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">S-F011</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Refusal: Dog stops or turns away from obstacle after commitment without completing it.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">P0</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">S-F012</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Run-out: Dog passes obstacle entrance without taking it when it is the correct next obstacle.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">P0</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">S-F013</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Wrong Course: Dog takes incorrect obstacle (wrong sequence number).</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">P0</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">S-F014</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Missed Contact: Dog exits contact obstacle without touching contact zone on descent.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">P0</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">S-F015</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Table Fault: Dog leaves table before judge's release or fails to assume required position.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">P0</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">S-F016</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Bar Knock: Dog displaces bar from jump cup.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">P0</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">S-F017</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Time Faults: Each full second over SCT adds 1 fault.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">P0</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">S-F018</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Maximum Course Time: Run terminates if dog exceeds maximum time limit (typically 2x SCT).</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">P0</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">S-F019</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Elimination: Three refusals or specific cumulative faults result in Elimination (non-qualifying score).</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">P0</td> </tr></tbody></table></div> before countdown</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">False start; timer resets, run restarts.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Run completes; fault scored normally.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Dog refuses three times in sequence</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none null">All fault types correctly detected in test scenarios.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Automated fault detection test suite.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">S-AC003</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Score calculation matches manual calculation for 20+ test runs.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Manual verification vs system output.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">S-AC004</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Fault replay triggers correctly and shows relevant moment.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Manual test: cause faults, verify replay.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">S-AC005</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Time-to-Beat format correctly determines winner.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Simulated championship test with multiple dogs.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">S-AC006</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Height divisions correctly applied to jump heights.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Test with dogs of different height classes.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">S-AC007</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.5 Camera and Replay Director System </h2><h3 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.5.1 Overview </h3><p dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">The camera and replay system provides broadcast-quality presentation. During gameplay, cameras follow handler and dog dynamically. After significant events and run completion, the replay system provides multi-angle, slow-motion review. </p><div class=""></div><hr class="border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#EBEBEB]/16"><h3 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.5.2 User Stories </h3><div class="relative w-full group/table mb-5"><div class="overflow-x-auto relative w-full scrollbar-hidden"><table class="min-w-full text-sm text-left text-gray-500 w-fit dark:text-gray-400"><thead class="text-gray-700 uppercase border-none dark:text-gray-400"><tr class="border-none bg-[#f7f7f7] dark:bg-[#F7F7F70F]"><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">ID</div></div> </th><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">User Story</div></div> </th></tr></thead> <tbody><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">C-001</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want the camera to follow my handler smoothly so I can see where I'm going.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">C-002</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want multiple camera angles to choose from so I can find my preferred view.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">C-003</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want automatic replay on faults so I can see what happened.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">C-004</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want slow-motion replay so I can analyze timing.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">C-005</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want to watch my full run replay after completion so I can review performance.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">C-006</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want to scrub through replay with frame-by-frame control.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">C-007</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want cinematic camera angles for highlights so my runs look professional.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">C-008</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want dog POV camera option so I can see the course from the dog's perspective.</td> </tr></tbody></table></div> <button class="absolute top-1 right-1 z-10 p-1.5 rounded-lg bg-[#f7f7f7] dark:bg-[#272A2F] hover:bg-[#E5E5E5] dark:hover:bg-[#272A2F] opacity-0 class="relative w-full group/table mb-5"><div class="overflow-x-auto relative w-full scrollbar-hidden"><table class="min-w-full text-sm text-left text-gray-500 w-fit dark:text-gray-400"><thead class="text-gray-700 uppercase border-none dark:text-gray-400"><tr class="border-none bg-[#f7f7f7] dark:bg-[#F7F7F70F]"><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">ID</div></div> </th><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">Requirement</div></div> </th></tr></thead> <tbody><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">C-NF001</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Replay recording must not impact gameplay frame rate (&gt;2fps overhead acceptable).</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">C-NF002</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Replay reconstruction must be deterministic within visual tolerance.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">C-NF003</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Camera interpolation must be smooth (no visible jitter).</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">C-NF004</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Replay scrubbing must respond within 100ms of input.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">C-NF005</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Camera system must integrate with Cinemachine for production-quality results.</td> </tr></tbody></table></div> <button modes provide clear view of handler and dog.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Manual test: verify each camera angle.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">C-AC002</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Replay accurately reconstructs run within visual tolerance.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Compare live gameplay to replay frame-by-frame.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">C-AC003</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Slow-motion playback is smooth at 0.1x speed.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Visual inspection; no frame drops.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">C-AC004</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Automatic replay triggers correctly on all fault types.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Cause each fault type; verify replay triggers.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">C-AC005</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Camera does not clip through geometry in any mode.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Test on all course layouts.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">C-AC006</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Replay scrubbing is responsive.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Input latency test: &lt;100ms response.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">C-AC007</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Multiple camera angles available during replay.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Manual test: switch angles during replay.</td> </tr></tbody></table></div> <button class="absolute top-1 right-1 z-10 p-1.5 rounded-lg bg-[#f7f7f7] dark:bg-[#272A2F] hover:bg-[#E5E5E5] </div><hr class="border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#EBEBEB]/16"><h2 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.6 UI / HUD System </h2><h3 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.6.1 Overview </h3><p dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">The UI/HUD system provides all player-facing interface elements including gameplay HUD, menus, score displays, replay controls, and accessibility features. The design should feel like a broadcast sports presentation. </p><div class=""></div><hr class="border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#EBEBEB]/16"><h3 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.6.2 User Stories </h3><div class="relative w-full group/table mb-5"><div class="overflow-x-auto relative w-full scrollbar-hidden"><table class="min-w-full text-sm text-left text-gray-500 w-fit dark:text-gray-400"><thead class="text-gray-700 uppercase border-none dark:text-gray-400"><tr class="border-none bg-[#f7f7f7] dark:bg-[#F7F7F70F]"><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">ID</div></div> </th><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">User Story</div></div> </th></tr></thead> <tbody><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">U-001</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want to see the current time and fault count during my run.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">U-002</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want to see the obstacle sequence so I know where to go next.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">U-003</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want to see feedback when I issue commands.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">U-004</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want clear post-run results with score breakdown.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">U-005</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want accessible menus for game modes and settings.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">U-006</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want HUD opacity and position to be configurable.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">U-007</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want the UI to support my accessibility needs (colorblind, screen reader, etc.).</td> </tr></tbody></table></div> <button class="absolute top-1 right-1 z-10 p-1.5 rounded-lg bg-[#f7f7f7] dark:bg-[#272A2F] hover:bg-[#E5E5E5] dark:hover:bg-[#272A2F] opacity-0 </div><hr class="border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#EBEBEB]/16"><h2 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.7 Audio System </h2><h3 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.7.1 Overview </h3><p dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">The audio system provides immersive soundscapes including spatial audio for dog movement, obstacle interactions, crowd ambience, environmental sound, music, and commentary integration. The mix must be dynamic and broadcast-quality. </p><div class=""></div><hr class="border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#EBEBEB]/16"><h3 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.7.2 User Stories </h3><div class="relative w-full group/table mb-5"><div class="overflow-x-auto relative w-full scrollbar-hidden"><table class="min-w-full text-sm text-left text-gray-500 w-fit dark:text-gray-400"><thead class="text-gray-700 uppercase border-none dark:text-gray-400"><tr class="border-none bg-[#f7f7f7] dark:bg-[#F7F7F70F]"><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">ID</div></div> </th><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">User Story</div></div> </th></tr></thead> <tbody><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">A-001</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want to hear the dog's footfalls and breathing so I feel connected to my partner.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">A-002</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want to hear obstacle impacts so I know when faults occur.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">A-003</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want reactive crowd audio so the arena feels alive.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">A-004</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want clear commentary that enhances the broadcast feel.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">A-005</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want audio cues for faults so I don't have to look at the HUD.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">A-006</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want configurable audio mix settings so I can balance elements.</td> </tr></tbody></table></div> <button class="absolute top-1 right-1 z-10 p-1.5 rounded-lg bg-[#f7f7f7] dark:bg-[#272A2F] </div><hr class="border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#EBEBEB]/16"><h3 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.7.3 Functional Requirements </h3><h4 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.7.3.1 Dog Audio </h4><div class="relative w-full group/table mb-5"><div class="overflow-x-auto relative w-full scrollbar-hidden"><table class="min-w-full text-sm text-left text-gray-500 w-fit dark:text-gray-400"><thead class="text-gray-700 uppercase border-none dark:text-gray-400"><tr class="border-none bg-[#f7f7f7] dark:bg-[#F7F7F70F]"><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">ID</div></div> </th><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">Requirement</div></div> </th><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">Priority</div></div> </th></tr></thead> <tbody><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">A-F001</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">System must play spatialized footfall audio matching dog gait and speed.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">P0</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">A-F002</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">System must play breathing audio that intensifies with exertion.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">P1</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">A-F003</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">System must play obstacle-specific audio: bar rattle, contact zone impact, tunnel echo, weave pole brush.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">P0</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">A-F004</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">System must play breed-specific vocalizations (barks, whines) based on dog state.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">P2</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">A-F005</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">System must play fault audio: bar knock, wrong course buzzer, refusal whistle.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">P0</td> </tr></tbody></table></div> <button class="absolute top-1 right-1 z-10 p-1.5 rounded-lg bg-[#f7f7f7] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">P0</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">System must support time-stretch for slow-motion replay (audio slows with video).</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none support configurable mix presets: default, commentary focus, immersive, minimal.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">System must support individual volume controls: master, music, sfx, commentary, crowd.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">A-NF003</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white support 5.1 surround and stereo configurations.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border dark:text-gray-400"><tr class="border-none bg-[#f7f7f7] dark:bg-[#F7F7F70F]"><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">Edge Case</div></div> </th><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">Resolution</div></div> max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Audio device disconnected</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Fallback to default device; display notification.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Audio memory exceeded</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Unload least-recently-used assets; may cause brief silence.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Too many simultaneous sounds</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Voice limiting; prioritize by mix hierarchy.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Visual + audio inspection.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: plays correctly for each obstacle type.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Test each obstacle type.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">A-AC003</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Crowd audio reacts appropriately to run events.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Test clean run, fault run, near-miss.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: correctly prioritizes commentary over other audio.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" </div><hr class="border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#EBEBEB]/16"><h2 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.8 Commentary System </h2><h3 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.8.1 Overview </h3><p dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">The commentary system provides broadcast-style play-by-play and color commentary. It integrates with the Eastworld content generation pipeline for dialogue and ElevenLabs for voice synthesis. Commentary must feel responsive, contextual, and avoid repetition. </p><div class=""></div><hr class="border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#EBEBEB]/16"><h3 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.8.2 User Stories </h3><div class="relative w-full group/table mb-5"><div class="overflow-x-auto relative w-full scrollbar-hidden"><table class="min-w-full text-sm text-left text-gray-500 w-fit dark:text-gray-400"><thead class="text-gray-700 uppercase border-none dark:text-gray-400"><tr class="border-none bg-[#f7f7f7] dark:bg-[#F7F7F70F]"><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">ID</div></div> </th><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">User Story</div></div> </th></tr></thead> <tbody><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">CM-001</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want play-by-play commentary that describes what's happening in real-time.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">CM-002</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want color commentary that adds insight and personality.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">CM-003</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want breed callouts so the commentary feels specific to my dog.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">CM-004</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want split-time callouts so I know if I'm on pace.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">CM-005</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want fault reactions that acknowledge mistakes.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">CM-006</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want championship pressure escalation in commentary.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">CM-007</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want commentary to not repeat the same lines too frequently.</td> </tr></tbody></table></div> <button class="absolute top-1 right-1 z-10 p-1.5 rounded-lg bg-[#f7f7f7] dark:bg-[#272A2F] hover:bg-[#E5E5E5] dark:hover:bg-[#272A2F] opacity-0 dark:text-gray-400"><tr class="border-none bg-[#f7f7f7] dark:bg-[#F7F7F70F]"><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal support play-by-play commentator (primary, describes action).</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] support PA announcer (course announcements, results).</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" class="text-gray-700 uppercase border-none dark:text-gray-400"><tr class="border-none bg-[#f7f7f7] dark:bg-[#F7F7F70F]"><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">Edge Case</div></div> </th><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">Resolution</div></div> </th></tr></thead> <tbody><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">No appropriate line available</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Play generic line or silence.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Commentary falls behind live action</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Skip queued lines; catch up to current moment.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Use fallback text (e.g., "The handler" if name missing).</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Audio file fails to load</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Skip line; continue commentary.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Player disables commentary</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Test each trigger type.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">CM-AC002</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Commentary does not repeat lines within cooldown window.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Extended playtest; log line occurrences.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">CM-AC003</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Commentary reflects current run context (breed, handler, venue).</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Test with multiple dog/handler/venue combinations.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] timing feels natural and not rushed.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" </div><hr class="border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#EBEBEB]/16"><h2 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.9 Crowd System </h2><h3 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.9.1 Overview </h3><p dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">The crowd system brings the arena to life with reactive spectators. Crowd behavior and audio respond to run performance, creating broadcast atmosphere and pressure feedback. </p><div class=""></div><hr class="border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#EBEBEB]/16"><h3 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.9.2 User Stories </h3><div class="relative w-full group/table mb-5"><div class="overflow-x-auto relative w-full scrollbar-hidden"><table class="min-w-full text-sm text-left text-gray-500 w-fit dark:text-gray-400"><thead class="text-gray-700 uppercase border-none dark:text-gray-400"><tr class="border-none bg-[#f7f7f7] dark:bg-[#F7F7F70F]"><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">ID</div></div> </th><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">User Story</div></div> </th></tr></thead> <tbody><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">CR-001</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want to see spectators in the arena so it feels like a real event.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">CR-002</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want the crowd to react to my performance so my successes feel rewarding.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">CR-003</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want crowd tension to build during close or high-stakes runs.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">CR-004</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want broadcast-style crowd cutaways so the presentation feels professional.</td> </tr></tbody></table></div> <button class="absolute top-1 right-1 z-10 p-1.5 rounded-lg bg-[#f7f7f7] dark:bg-[#272A2F] hover:bg-[#E5E5E5] dark:hover:bg-[#272A2F] opacity-0
