dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.10 Progression / Career / Unlock System </h2><h3 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.10.1 Overview </h3><p dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">The progression system provides long-term motivation through career mode, unlockable content, and persistent records. Players earn access to new handlers, dogs, and venues through gameplay achievements. </p><div class=""></div><hr class="border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#EBEBEB]/16"><h3 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.10.2 User Stories </h3><div class="relative w-full group/table mb-5"><div class="overflow-x-auto relative w-full scrollbar-hidden"><table class="min-w-full text-sm text-left text-gray-500 w-fit dark:text-gray-400"><thead class="text-gray-700 uppercase border-none dark:text-gray-400"><tr class="border-none bg-[#f7f7f7] dark:bg-[#F7F7F70F]"><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">ID</div></div> </th><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">User Story</div></div> </th></tr></thead> <tbody><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">PR-001</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want a career mode with progression so I have long-term goals.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">PR-002</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want to unlock new dogs and handlers so I can expand my options.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">PR-003</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want to track my performance records so I can see improvement.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">PR-004</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want increasing difficulty as I progress so the challenge scales.</td> </tr></tbody></table></div> <button null">Career must have unlock progression: complete earlier events to unlock later ones.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] </div><hr class="border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#EBEBEB]/16"><h2 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.11 Online Features System </h2><h3 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.11.1 Overview </h3><p dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">Online features include leaderboards, ghost runs, and cloud saves. Multiplayer is explicitly excluded from v1 scope but architecture should not preclude future addition. </p><div class=""></div><hr class="border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#EBEBEB]/16"><h3 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.11.2 User Stories </h3><div class="relative w-full group/table mb-5"><div class="overflow-x-auto relative w-full scrollbar-hidden"><table class="min-w-full text-sm text-left text-gray-500 w-fit dark:text-gray-400"><thead class="text-gray-700 uppercase border-none dark:text-gray-400"><tr class="border-none bg-[#f7f7f7] dark:bg-[#F7F7F70F]"><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">ID</div></div> </th><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">User Story</div></div> </th></tr></thead> <tbody><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">ON-001</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want to see how my times compare to other players on leaderboards.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">ON-002</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want to race against ghost runs from other players.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">ON-003</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player, I want my progression saved to the cloud so I can play on multiple devices.</td> </tr></tbody></table></div> <button class="absolute top-1 right-1 z-10 p-1.5 rounded-lg bg-[#f7f7f7] dark:bg-[#272A2F] hover:bg-[#E5E5E5] dark:hover:bg-[#272A2F] opacity-0 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">ON-AC001</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Leaderboards display correct rankings.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Test with multiple submissions; verify ordering.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">ON-AC002</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Ghost runs play accurately against live run.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Race against ghost; verify synchronization.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">ON-AC003</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Cloud saves sync correctly across devices.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Test on two devices with same account.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] works correctly.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Disconnect </div><hr class="border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#EBEBEB]/16"><h2 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.12 Accessibility System </h2><h3 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.12.1 Overview </h3><p dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">Accessibility features ensure the game is playable by users with various disabilities. Features include visual, auditory, and motor accessibility options. </p><div class=""></div><hr class="border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#EBEBEB]/16"><h3 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">2.12.2 User Stories </h3><div class="relative w-full group/table mb-5"><div class="overflow-x-auto relative w-full scrollbar-hidden"><table class="min-w-full text-sm text-left text-gray-500 w-fit dark:text-gray-400"><thead class="text-gray-700 uppercase border-none dark:text-gray-400"><tr class="border-none bg-[#f7f7f7] dark:bg-[#F7F7F70F]"><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">ID</div></div> </th><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">User Story</div></div> </th></tr></thead> <tbody><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">AC-001</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a colorblind player, I want colorblind modes so I can distinguish game elements.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">AC-002</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player with low vision, I want scalable UI and high contrast modes.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">AC-003</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a deaf or hard-of-hearing player, I want visual cues for audio events.</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">AC-004</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">As a player with motor impairments, I want configurable input timing and sensitivity.</td> </tr></tbody></table></div> <button class="absolute top-1 right-1 z-10 p-1.5 rounded-lg bg-[#f7f7f7] dark:bg-[#272A2F] hover:bg-[#E5E5E5] dark:hover:bg-[#272A2F] opacity-0 group-hover/table:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200"><svg class="size-4" class="text-gray-700 uppercase border-none dark:text-gray-400"><tr class="border-none bg-[#f7f7f7] dark:bg-[#F7F7F70F]"><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">ID</div></div> </th><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">Requirement</div></div> </th><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">Priority</div></div> </th></tr></thead> <tbody><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">AC-F001</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">System must provide colorblind modes: protanopia, deuteranopia, tritanopia, achromatopsia.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">P0</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">AC-F002</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">System must provide high contrast mode for UI and gameplay elements.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">P0</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">AC-F003</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">System must provide UI scaling from 75% to 150%.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">P0</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">AC-F004</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">System must provide visual indicators for all audio cues: fault sounds, countdown, command acknowledgment.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">P0</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">AC-F005</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">System must provide configurable input hold times for timed interactions.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">P1</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">AC-F006</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">System must provide configurable input sensitivity curves.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">P1</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">AC-F007</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">System must support toggle vs. hold for sprint and other sustained inputs.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">P0</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">AC-F008</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">System must provide one-handed play mode (remap all functions to one side of controller/keyboard).</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">P2</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">AC-F009</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">System must provide auto-camera option for players who cannot manually control camera.</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: ͼ5k"><div class="cm-announced" aria-live="polite"></div><div tabindex="-1" class="cm-scroller"><div spellcheck="false" autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="off" writingsuggestions="false" translate="no" contenteditable="false" class="cm-content" role="textbox" aria-multiline="true" data-language="csharp" style="tab-size: 4;"><div class="cm-line"><span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5s">class</span> <span class="ͼ5m">HandlerController</span> : <span class="ͼ5m">MonoBehaviour</span></div><div class="cm-line">{</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Configuration</span></div><div class="cm-line">    [<span class="ͼ5m">SerializeField</span>] <span class="ͼ5s">private</span> <span class="ͼ5m">HandlerData</span> <span class="ͼ5m">_data</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    [<span class="ͼ5m">SerializeField</span>] <span class="ͼ5s">private</span> <span class="ͼ5m">HandlerAnimationController</span> <span class="ͼ5m">_animationController</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// State</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Position</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=&gt;</span> <span class="ͼ5m">transform</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">position</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Velocity</span> { <span class="ͼ5s">get</span>; <span class="ͼ5s">private</span> <span class="ͼ5s">set</span>; }</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Facing</span> { <span class="ͼ5s">get</span>; <span class="ͼ5s">private</span> <span class="ͼ5s">set</span>; }</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Speed</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=&gt;</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Velocity</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">magnitude</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5o">bool</span> <span class="ͼ5m">IsSprinting</span> { <span class="ͼ5s">get</span>; <span class="ͼ5s">private</span> <span class="ͼ5s">set</span>; }</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5m">ArmGesture</span> <span class="ͼ5m">CurrentGesture</span> { <span class="ͼ5s">get</span>; <span class="ͼ5s">private</span> <span class="ͼ5s">set</span>; }</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Methods</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5s">void</span> <span class="ͼ5m">SetMovementInput</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">Vector2</span> w-full"><div class="cm-editor ͼ1 ͼ2 ͼ4 ͼ85 ͼ5k"><div class="cm-announced" aria-live="polite"></div><div tabindex="-1" class="cm-scroller"><div spellcheck="false" autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="off" writingsuggestions="false" translate="no" contenteditable="false" class="cm-content" role="textbox" aria-multiline="true" style="tab-size: 4;"><div class="cm-line">┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐</div><div class="cm-line">│                        EVENT SEQUENCE                               │</div><div class="cm-line">├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤</div><div class="cm-line">│                                                                     │</div><div class="cm-line">│  1. COUNTDOWN PHASE                                                 │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── OnCountdownStart                                            │</div><div class="cm-line">│     │   └── Camera: Reset to start position                         │</div><div class="cm-line">│     │   └── Audio: Ambient crowd, start music bed                   │</div><div class="cm-line">│     │   └── Dog: Enter StartWait state                              │</div><div class="cm-line">│     │   └── Handler: Positioned at start line                       │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── OnCountdownTick (3, 2, 1)                                   │</div><div class="cm-line">│     │   └── Audio: Beep sound                                       │</div><div class="cm-line">│     │   └── UI: Display number                                      │</div><div class="cm-line">│     └── OnCountdownComplete ("GO")                                  │</div><div class="cm-line">│         └── Audio: Go sound                                         │</div><div class="cm-line">│         └── Scoring: Start timer                                    │</div><div class="cm-line">│         └── Dog: Enter Running state                                │</div><div class="cm-line">│         └── Commentary: Play run start line                         │</div><div class="cm-line">│                                                                     │</div><div class="cm-line">│  2. GAMEPLAY PHASE                                                  │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── OnObstacleApproach (dog commits)                            │</div><div class="cm-line">│     │   └── Dog: Update target, plan path                           │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── OnObstacleEntry (dog enters obstacle zone)                  │</div><div class="cm-line">│     │   └── Obstacle: OnDogEnter()                                  │</div><div class="cm-line">│     │   └── Animation: Trigger entry animation                      │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── OnObstacleExit (dog exits obstacle)                         │</div><div class="cm-line">│     │   └── Obstacle: OnDogExit()                                   │</div><div class="cm-line">│     │   └── Scoring: Record split time                              │</div><div class="cm-line">│     │   └── Commentary: Play completion line                        │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── OnFault (fault detected)                                    │</div><div class="cm-line">│     │   └── Scoring: Record fault                                   │</div><div class="cm-line">│     │   └── Audio: Fault sound                                      │</div><div class="cm-line">│     │   └── UI: Display fault notification                          │</div><div class="cm-line">│     │   └── Commentary: Play fault line                             │</div><div class="cm-line">│     │   └── Replay: Trigger automatic replay                        │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── OnCommandIssued (handler input)                             │</div><div class="cm-gap" style="height: 266px;"></div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-layer-above cm-cursorLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: 150; animation-duration: 1200ms;"><div class="cm-cursor cm-cursor-primary" style="left: 6px; top: 5px; height: 16px;"></div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-selectionLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: -2;"></div></div></div></div></div> <div id="plt-canvas-9c38d197-2689-41f4-8dd0-b85de37865cb-380" class="bg-gray-50 dark:bg-[#202123] dark:text-white max-w-full overflow-x-auto contenteditable="false" class="cm-content" role="textbox" aria-multiline="true" style="tab-size: 4;"><div class="cm-line">┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐</div><div class="cm-line">│                  REPLAY RECORDING                        │</div><div class="cm-line">├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤</div><div class="cm-line">│                                                          │</div><div class="cm-line">│  State Sampling (120Hz):                                 │</div><div class="cm-line">│  ├── Handler: position, rotation, animation state        │</div><div class="cm-line">│  ├── Dog: position, rotation, velocity, state, target    │</div><div class="cm-line">│  └── Obstacles: dynamic state (bars, teeter angle)       │</div><div class="cm-line">│                                                          │</div><div class="cm-line">│  Event Log (on occurrence):                              │</div><div class="cm-line">│  ├── Commands: type, timestamp, context                  │</div><div class="cm-line">│  ├── Faults: type, timestamp, position                   │</div><div class="cm-line">│  ├── Obstacle completions: sequence, timestamp           │</div><div class="cm-line">│  └── Split times: sequence, time                        │</div><div class="cm-line">│                                                          │</div><div class="cm-line">│  Compression:                                            │</div><div class="cm-line">│  ├── Keyframe every 1 second (full state)                │</div><div class="cm-line">│  ├── Delta encoding between keyframes                    │</div><div class="cm-line">│  └── Events stored as discrete entries                   │</div><div class="cm-line">│                                                          │</div><div class="cm-line">└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘</div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-layer-above cm-cursorLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: 150; animation-duration: 1200ms;"><div class="cm-cursor cm-cursor-primary" style="left: 6px; top: 5px; height: 16px;"></div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-selectionLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: -2;"></div></div></div></div></div> <div id="plt-canvas-9c38d197-2689-41f4-8dd0-b85de37865cb-387" class="bg-gray-50 dark:bg-[#202123] dark:text-white max-w-full overflow-x-auto scrollbar-hidden"></div> </div> <div class=""></div><h3 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">3.7.2 Playback Strategy </h3><p dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c"><strong>Deterministic Reconstruction:</strong> </p><div class=""></div><ol start="1" dir="auto" data-emit-thinking-stage="false" style="padding-left: calc(var(--spacing, .25rem) * 4);"><li class="text-start">Seek to nearest keyframe </li><li class="text-start">Restore full state from keyframe </li><li class="text-start">Apply deltas to reach target time </li><li class="text-start">Process events at correct timestamps </li><li class="text-start">Interpolate positions for smooth playback </li></ol><div class=""></div><h3 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">3.7.3 Data Format </h3><div class="relative my-2 flex flex-col rounded-xl border border-[#0000000A] bg-[#F7F7F7] dark:bg-[#202123] p-2" dir="ltr"><div class="absolute pl-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium contenteditable="false" class="cm-content" role="textbox" aria-multiline="true" style="tab-size: 4;"><div class="cm-line">┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐</div><div class="cm-line">│         CLOUD SYNC STRATEGY                 │</div><div class="cm-line">├─────────────────────────────────────────────┤</div><div class="cm-line">│                                              │</div><div class="cm-line">│  1. On game start:                          │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── Download cloud save                 │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── Compare timestamps                  │</div><div class="cm-line">│     └── Prompt if conflict:                 │</div><div class="cm-line">│         ├── "Cloud is newer: Use cloud?"    │</div><div class="cm-line">│         ├── "Local is newer: Upload?"       │</div><div class="cm-line">│         └── "Keep both: Merge?"             │</div><div class="cm-line">│                                              │</div><div class="cm-line">│  2. On save event:                          │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── Save locally                        │</div><div class="cm-line">│     └── Queue cloud upload                  │</div><div class="cm-line">│                                              │</div><div class="cm-line">│  3. On game end:                            │</div><div class="cm-line">│     └── Force cloud sync                    │</div><div class="cm-line">│                                              │</div><div contenteditable="false" class="cm-content" role="textbox" aria-multiline="true" style="tab-size: 4;"><div class="cm-line">┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐</div><div class="cm-line">│                  MIGRATION PATH                            │</div><div class="cm-line">├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤</div><div class="cm-line">│                                                            │</div><div class="cm-line">│  Option A: Shared Codebase (Recommended)                   │</div><div class="cm-line">│  ├── Develop POC in main branch                           │</div><div class="cm-line">│  ├── Use feature flags or build defines for POC scope     │</div><div class="cm-line">│  ├── POC build = subset of production code                │</div><div class="cm-line">│  └── Production = POC code + expanded features            │</div><div class="cm-line">│                                                            │</div><div class="cm-line">│  Option B: Prototype Branch                               │</div><div class="cm-line">│  ├── Develop POC in separate branch                       │</div><div class="cm-line">│  ├── Validate core loop                                   │</div><div class="cm-line">│  ├── Port learnings to main branch                        │</div><div class="cm-line">│  └── Discard prototype code                               │</div><div class="cm-line">│                                                            │</div><div class="cm-line">│  Recommendation: Option A                                  │</div><div class="cm-line">│  Reason: Minimizes rework, preserves architecture         │</div><div class="cm-line">│                                                            │</div><div class="cm-line">└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘</div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-layer-above cm-cursorLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: 150; dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">4.1.2 State Definitions </h3><div class="relative w-full group/table mb-5"><div class="overflow-x-auto relative w-full scrollbar-hidden"><table class="min-w-full text-sm text-left text-gray-500 w-fit dark:text-gray-400"><thead class="text-gray-700 uppercase border-none dark:text-gray-400"><tr class="border-none bg-[#f7f7f7] dark:bg-[#F7F7F70F]"><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">State</div></div> </th><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">Description</div></div> </th><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">Entry Conditions</div></div> </th><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">Exit Conditions</div></div> </th></tr></thead> <tbody><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Idle</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Dog not active; no course loaded</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Game start</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Course loaded</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">StartWait</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Dog at start line, waiting for countdown</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Countdown begins</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">"GO" signal</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Running</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Dog moving toward next obstacle; evaluating options</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Run start, obstacle exit, search complete</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Obstacle approach, search, hesitate, finish</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">ObstacleApproach</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Dog committed to obstacle; adjusting approach</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Obstacle within commitment distance</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Obstacle entry (valid approach), hesitate (invalid approach)</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">ObstacleExecution</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Dog traversing obstacle</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Valid entry to obstacle zone</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Obstacle exit</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">ObstacleExit</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Dog exiting obstacle; evaluating next target</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Obstacle traversal complete</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Running (next obstacle identified), Search (no target)</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Hesitate</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Dog uncertain; slowing or stopping</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Conflicting commands, unclear target</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Running (clear command), Search (no clear option)</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Search</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Dog has no target; moving toward handler</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">No valid obstacles, hesitation timeout</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Running (target found), Fault (timeout)</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">FaultRecovery</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Dog recovering from fault; awaiting handler</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Fault detected</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Recovery timeout + handler command</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Finish</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Dog crossed finish line; run complete</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Finish line crossed</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Results screen</td> </tr></tbody></table></div> <button class="absolute top-1 right-1 z-10 p-1.5 rounded-lg bg-[#f7f7f7] dark:bg-[#272A2F] hover:bg-[#E5E5E5] dark:hover:bg-[#272A2F] opacity-0 class="cm-line">┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐</div><div class="cm-line">│                 DECISION ARCHITECTURE                      │</div><div class="cm-line">├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤</div><div class="cm-line">│                                                            │</div><div class="cm-line">│  Layer 1: State Machine (What am I doing?)                │</div><div class="cm-line">│  ├── Controls high-level behavior                         │</div><div class="cm-line">│  └── State transitions based on context                   │</div><div class="cm-line">│                                                            │</div><div class="cm-line">│  Layer 2: Target Selection (Where should I go?)           │</div><div class="cm-line">│  ├── Evaluates all visible obstacles                      │</div><div class="cm-line">│  ├── Scores each based on utility function                │</div><div class="cm-line">│  └── Selects highest-scoring target                       │</div><div class="cm-line">│                                                            │</div><div class="cm-line">│  Layer 3: Path Planning (How do I get there?)             │</div><div class="cm-line">│  ├── Calculates approach path                             │</div><div class="cm-line">│  ├── Adjusts for momentum and turning                     │</div><div class="cm-line">│  └── Considers handler position                           │</div><div class="cm-line">│                                                            │</div><div class="cm-line">│  Layer 4: Movement Execution (Move now)                   │</div><div class="cm-line">│  ├── Applies acceleration/deceleration                    │</div><div class="cm-line">│  ├── Executes turning                                     │</div><div class="cm-line">│  └── Handles collision avoidance                          │</div><div class="cm-line">│                                                            │</div><div class="cm-line">└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘</div></div><div class="cm-layer class="cm-announced" aria-live="polite"></div><div tabindex="-1" class="cm-scroller"><div spellcheck="false" autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="off" writingsuggestions="false" translate="no" contenteditable="false" class="cm-content" role="textbox" aria-multiline="true" data-language="csharp" style="tab-size: 4;"><div class="cm-line"><span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">CalculateObstacleUtility</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">ObstacleAffordance</span> <span class="ͼ5m">obstacle</span>, <span class="ͼ5m">DogContext</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>)</div><div class="cm-line">{</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">utility</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5n">0f</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Base utility: Is this the correct next obstacle?</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">if</span> (<span class="ͼ5m">obstacle</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">SequenceNumber</span> <span class="ͼ5q">==</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">NextExpectedSequence</span>)</div><div class="cm-line">    {</div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5m">utility</span> <span class="ͼ5q">+=</span> <span class="ͼ5n">100f</span>; <span class="ͼ5l">// Strong preference for correct obstacle</span></div><div class="cm-line">    }</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">else</span></div><div class="cm-line">    {</div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5m">utility</span> <span class="ͼ5q">-=</span> <span class="ͼ5n">50f</span>; <span class="ͼ5l">// Penalty for wrong obstacle</span></div><div class="cm-line">    }</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Distance factor (closer is generally better)</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">distance</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Distance</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">DogPosition</span>, <span class="ͼ5m">obstacle</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Position</span>);</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">utility</span> <span class="ͼ5q">-=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">distance</span> <span class="ͼ5q">*</span> <span class="ͼ5n">0.5f</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Approach angle factor (better angle = higher utility)</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span> <span class="ͼ5m">toObstacle</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> (<span class="ͼ5m">obstacle</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Position</span> <span class="ͼ5q">-</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">DogPosition</span>).<span class="ͼ5m">normalized</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span> <span class="ͼ5m">approachDir</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">obstacle</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">GetBestApproachDirection</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">DogPosition</span>);</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">angleAlignment</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Dot</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">toObstacle</span>, <span class="ͼ5m">approachDir</span>);</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">utility</span> <span class="ͼ5q">+=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">angleAlignment</span> <span class="ͼ5q">*</span> <span class="ͼ5n">20f</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Handler position factor (dog prefers handler proximity)</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">handlerDistance</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Distance</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">HandlerPosition</span>, <span class="ͼ5m">obstacle</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Position</span>);</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">idealDistance</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Breed</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">HandlerProximityPreference</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">handlerProximityScore</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5q">-</span><span class="ͼ5m">Mathf</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Abs</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">handlerDistance</span> <span class="ͼ5q">-</span> <span class="ͼ5m">idealDistance</span>) <span class="ͼ5q">*</span> <span class="ͼ5n">2f</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">utility</span> <span class="ͼ5q">+=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">handlerProximityScore</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Handler facing factor (is handler facing this obstacle?)</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span> <span class="ͼ5m">handlerToObstacle</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> (<span class="ͼ5m">obstacle</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Position</span> <span class="ͼ5q">-</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">HandlerPosition</span>).<span class="ͼ5m">normalized</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">handlerFacing</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Dot</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">HandlerFacing</span>, <span class="ͼ5m">handlerToObstacle</span>);</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">utility</span> <span class="ͼ5q">+=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">handlerFacing</span> <span class="ͼ5q">*</span> <span class="ͼ5n">15f</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Command factor (did handler command this obstacle?)</span></div><div class="cm-gap" style="height: 252px;"></div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-layer-above cm-cursorLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: 150; animation-duration: 1200ms;"><div class="cm-cursor cm-cursor-primary" style="left: 6px; top: 5px; height: 16px;"></div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-selectionLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: -2;"></div></div></div></div></div> <div class="cm-announced" aria-live="polite"></div><div tabindex="-1" class="cm-scroller"><div spellcheck="false" autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="off" writingsuggestions="false" translate="no" contenteditable="false" class="cm-content" role="textbox" aria-multiline="true" style="tab-size: 4;"><div class="cm-line">┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐</div><div class="cm-line">│              COMMAND INTERPRETATION PIPELINE               │</div><div class="cm-line">├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤</div><div class="cm-line">│                                                            │</div><div class="cm-line">│  1. INPUT STAGE                                            │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── Command received (type + timestamp)               │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── Handler context captured (position, facing, vel)  │</div><div class="cm-line">│     └── Added to command buffer                           │</div><div class="cm-line">│                                                            │</div><div class="cm-line">│  2. CONTEXT RESOLUTION                                     │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── Current dog state checked                         │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── Time since command calculated                     │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── Recent commands evaluated                         │</div><div class="cm-line">│     └── Environmental factors considered                  │</div><div class="cm-line">│                                                            │</div><div class="cm-line">│  3. INTERPRETATION                                         │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── Command type determines resolution strategy       │</div><div class="cm-line">│     │   ├── Directional (Come Bye, Away, Here, Out)       │</div><div class="cm-line">│     │   ├── Object (Jump, Tunnel, Weave, Table)           │</div><div class="cm-line">│     │   └── Action (Go)                                   │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── Handler context modifies interpretation           │</div><div class="cm-line">│     └── Breed traits modify response                      │</div><div class="cm-line">│                                                            │</div><div class="cm-line">│  4. CONFIDENCE CALCULATION                                 │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── Base confidence from command clarity              │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── Modifier from handler position/facing             │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── Modifier from timing                              │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── Modifier from breed training level                │</div><div class="cm-line">│     └── Result: 0.0 (ignore) to 1.0 (obey)               │</div><div class="cm-line">│                                                            │</div><div class="cm-line">│  5. ACTION                                                 │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── If confidence &gt; threshold: execute                │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── If confidence marginal: partial response          │</div><div class="cm-line">│     └── If confidence low: ignore or hesitate             │</div><div class="cm-line">│                                                            │</div><div class="cm-line">└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘</div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-layer-above cm-cursorLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: 150; animation-duration: 1200ms;"><div class="cm-cursor cm-cursor-primary" style="left: 6px; top: 5px; height: 16px;"></div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-selectionLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: -2;"></div></div></div></div></div> <div id="plt-canvas-9c38d197-2689-41f4-8dd0-b85de37865cb-453" class="bg-gray-50 dark:bg-[#202123] dark:text-white max-w-full overflow-x-auto scrollbar-hidden"></div> </div> <div class=""></div><h3 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">4.3.2 Command Resolution Table </h3><div class="relative w-full group/table mb-5"><div class="overflow-x-auto relative w-full scrollbar-hidden"><table class="min-w-full text-sm text-left text-gray-500 w-fit dark:text-gray-400"><thead class="text-gray-700 uppercase border-none dark:text-gray-400"><tr class="border-none bg-[#f7f7f7] dark:bg-[#F7F7F70F]"><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">Command</div></div> </th><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">Handler Context</div></div> </th><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">Resolution</div></div> </th></tr></thead> <tbody><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Come Bye</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Facing right relative to dog's direction</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Turn right (clockwise around handler)</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Away</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Facing left relative to dog's direction</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Turn left (counter-clockwise around handler)</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Here</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Facing toward dog, velocity toward dog</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Return to handler</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Out</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Facing away from dog, gesture outward</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Take obstacle farther from handler</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Jump</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Any, with obstacle in perception</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Nearest bar/tire jump</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Tunnel</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Any, with tunnel in perception</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Nearest tunnel (correct end)</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Weave</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Any, with weave poles in perception</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Nearest weave entry</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Table</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Any, with table in perception</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Nearest pause table</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Go</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Facing away from dog, running away</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Extend stride, take next obstacle class="cm-announced" aria-live="polite"></div><div tabindex="-1" class="cm-scroller"><div spellcheck="false" autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="off" writingsuggestions="false" translate="no" contenteditable="false" class="cm-content" role="textbox" aria-multiline="true" data-language="csharp" style="tab-size: 4;"><div class="cm-line"><span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">CalculateCommandConfidence</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">Command</span> <span class="ͼ5m">command</span>, <span class="ͼ5m">DogContext</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>)</div><div class="cm-line">{</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">baseConfidence</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5n">0.5f</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Handler facing alignment (0 to 1)</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">facingScore</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">CalculateFacingAlignment</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">command</span>, <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>);</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">baseConfidence</span> <span class="ͼ5q">+=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">facingScore</span> <span class="ͼ5q">*</span> <span class="ͼ5n">0.2f</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Handler gesture match (0 or 1)</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5o">bool</span> <span class="ͼ5m">gestureMatch</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">DoesGestureMatchCommand</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">command</span>, <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>);</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">if</span> (<span class="ͼ5m">gestureMatch</span>) <span class="ͼ5m">baseConfidence</span> <span class="ͼ5q">+=</span> <span class="ͼ5n">0.15f</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Handler velocity match (0 to 1)</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">velocityMatch</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">CalculateVelocityMatch</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">command</span>, <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>);</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">baseConfidence</span> <span class="ͼ5q">+=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">velocityMatch</span> <span class="ͼ5q">*</span> <span class="ͼ5n">0.1f</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Timing window (fresh command = higher confidence)</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">timeSinceCommand</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Time</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">time</span> <span class="ͼ5q">-</span> <span class="ͼ5m">command</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Timestamp</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">timingScore</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Mathf</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Max</span>(<span class="ͼ5n">0</span>, <span class="ͼ5n">1f</span> <span class="ͼ5q">-</span> (<span class="ͼ5m">timeSinceCommand</span> <span class="ͼ5q">/</span> <span class="ͼ5n">2f</span>)); <span class="ͼ5l">// 2 second decay</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">baseConfidence</span> <span class="ͼ5q">+=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">timingScore</span> <span class="ͼ5q">*</span> <span class="ͼ5n">0.15f</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Breed training level</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">baseConfidence</span> <span class="ͼ5q">*=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Breed</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">HandlerSensitivity</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Dog state modifier</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">if</span> (<span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">DogState</span> <span class="ͼ5q">==</span> <span class="ͼ5m">DogState</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Committed</span>)</div><div class="cm-line">    {</div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5m">baseConfidence</span> <span class="ͼ5q">*=</span> <span class="ͼ5n">0.3f</span>; <span class="ͼ5l">// Hard to change mind when committed</span></div><div class="cm-line">    }</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">return</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Mathf</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Clamp01</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">baseConfidence</span>);</div><div class="cm-line">}</div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-layer-above cm-cursorLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: 150; animation-duration: 1200ms;"><div class="cm-cursor cm-cursor-primary" style="left: 6px; top: 5px; height: 16px;"></div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-selectionLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: w-full"><div class="cm-editor ͼ1 ͼ2 ͼ4 ͼ8h ͼ5k"><div class="cm-announced" aria-live="polite"></div><div tabindex="-1" class="cm-scroller"><div spellcheck="false" autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="off" writingsuggestions="false" translate="no" contenteditable="false" class="cm-content" role="textbox" aria-multiline="true" data-language="csharp" style="tab-size: 4;"><div class="cm-line"><span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5o">bool</span> <span class="ͼ5m">ShouldCommitToObstacle</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">ObstacleAffordance</span> <span class="ͼ5m">obstacle</span>, <span class="ͼ5m">DogContext</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>)</div><div class="cm-line">{</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Calculate distance to obstacle entry point</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">distance</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Distance</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">DogPosition</span>, <span class="ͼ5m">obstacle</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">GetNearestEntry</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">DogPosition</span>));</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Get breed-specific commitment distance</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">commitmentDistance</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Breed</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">CommitmentDistance</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Adjust for speed (faster = commit earlier)</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">speedFactor</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">CurrentSpeed</span> <span class="ͼ5q">/</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Breed</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">TopSpeed</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">commitmentDistance</span> <span class="ͼ5q">*=</span> (<span class="ͼ5n">1f</span> <span class="ͼ5q">+</span> <span class="ͼ5m">speedFactor</span> <span class="ͼ5q">*</span> <span class="ͼ5n">0.5f</span>);</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Check if within commitment range</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">if</span> (<span class="ͼ5m">distance</span> <span class="ͼ5q">&gt;</span> <span class="ͼ5m">commitmentDistance</span>)</div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5s">return</span> <span class="ͼ5s">false</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Check approach angle validity</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span> <span class="ͼ5m">approachDir</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> (<span class="ͼ5m">obstacle</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">GetNearestEntry</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">DogPosition</span>) <span class="ͼ5q">-</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">DogPosition</span>).<span class="ͼ5m">normalized</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">approachAngle</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Angle</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">DogVelocity</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">normalized</span>, <span class="ͼ5m">approachDir</span>);</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">if</span> (<span class="ͼ5m">approachAngle</span> <span class="ͼ5q">&gt;</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Breed</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">ApproachAngleTolerance</span>)</div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5s">return</span> <span class="ͼ5s">false</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Commit!</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">return</span> <span class="ͼ5s">true</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">}</div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-layer-above cm-cursorLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: 150; animation-duration: 1200ms;"><div class="cm-cursor cm-cursor-primary" style="left: 6px; top: 5px; height: 16px;"></div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-selectionLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: -2;"></div></div></div></div></div> <div id="plt-canvas-9c38d197-2689-41f4-8dd0-b85de37865cb-463" class="bg-gray-50 dark:bg-[#202123] dark:text-white max-w-full overflow-x-auto scrollbar-hidden"></div> </div> <div class=""></div><h3 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">4.4.2 Commitment Behavior </h3><p dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">Once committed: </p><div class=""></div><ol start="1" dir="auto" data-emit-thinking-stage="false" style="padding-left: calc(var(--spacing, .25rem) * 4);"><li class="text-start"><strong>Lock target</strong>: Dog no longer evaluates other obstacles </li><li class="text-start"><strong>Adjust approach</strong>: Fine-tune path to optimal entry </li><li class="text-start"><strong>Reduce handler influence</strong>: Commands have reduced effect </li><li class="text-start"><strong>Prepare for execution</strong>: Trigger animation preparation </li><li class="text-start"><strong>Monitor for faults</strong>: Detect refusals, run-outs </li></ol><div class=""></div><hr class="border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#EBEBEB]/16"><h2 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">4.5 Recovery Logic </h2><h3 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">4.5.1 Hesitation Recovery </h3><div class="relative my-2 flex flex-col rounded-xl border border-[#0000000A] autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="off" writingsuggestions="false" translate="no" contenteditable="false" class="cm-content" role="textbox" aria-multiline="true" data-language="csharp" style="tab-size: 4;"><div class="cm-line"><span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5s">void</span> <span class="ͼ5m">ProcessHesitation</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">DogContext</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>)</div><div class="cm-line">{</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Dog slows down</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">TargetSpeed</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">CurrentSpeed</span> <span class="ͼ5q">*</span> <span class="ͼ5n">0.3f</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Head turns toward handler</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">HeadTarget</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">HandlerPosition</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Wait for clarification</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">hesitationTime</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5n">0f</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">maxHesitationTime</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Breed</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">ConfusionRecoveryTime</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// If handler provides clear command, resume</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// If timeout, enter Search state</span></div><div class="cm-line">}</div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-layer-above cm-cursorLayer" class="cm-announced" aria-live="polite"></div><div tabindex="-1" class="cm-scroller"><div spellcheck="false" autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="off" writingsuggestions="false" translate="no" contenteditable="false" class="cm-content" role="textbox" aria-multiline="true" data-language="csharp" style="tab-size: 4;"><div class="cm-line"><span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5s">void</span> <span class="ͼ5m">ProcessSearch</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">DogContext</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>)</div><div class="cm-line">{</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Default: move toward handler</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span> <span class="ͼ5m">target</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">HandlerPosition</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// If handler is moving, predict their position</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">if</span> (<span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">HandlerVelocity</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">magnitude</span> <span class="ͼ5q">&gt;</span> <span class="ͼ5n">0.5f</span>)</div><div class="cm-line">    {</div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5m">target</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">HandlerPosition</span> <span class="ͼ5q">+</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">HandlerVelocity</span> <span class="ͼ5q">*</span> <span class="ͼ5n">2f</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    }</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Move at moderate speed</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">TargetSpeed</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Breed</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">TopSpeed</span> <span class="ͼ5q">*</span> <span class="ͼ5n">0.5f</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">TargetPosition</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">target</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Continuously re-evaluate for obstacles</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">EvaluateVisibleObstacles</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">context</span>);</div><div class="cm-line">}</div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-layer-above cm-cursorLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: 150; animation-duration: 1200ms;"><div class="cm-cursor cm-cursor-primary" style="left: 6px; top: 5px; height: 16px;"></div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-selectionLayer"
