rounded-b-lg overflow-hidden"><div class="h-full w-full"><div class="cm-editor ͼ1 ͼ2 ͼ4 ͼ8k ͼ5k"><div class="cm-announced" aria-live="polite"></div><div tabindex="-1" class="cm-scroller"><div spellcheck="false" autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="off" writingsuggestions="false" translate="no" contenteditable="false" class="cm-content" role="textbox" aria-multiline="true" data-language="csharp" style="tab-size: 4;"><div class="cm-line"><span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5s">void</span> <span class="ͼ5m">ProcessFaultRecovery</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">DogContext</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>, <span class="ͼ5m">FaultType</span> <span class="ͼ5m">fault</span>)</div><div class="cm-line">{</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Stop movement briefly</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">TargetSpeed</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5n">0f</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Visual feedback (ears back, head down)</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">BodyLanguage</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">BodyLanguageState</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Apologetic</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Wait for handler repositioning</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">recoveryTime</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Breed</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">FaultRecoveryTime</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// After recovery time, resume with handler guidance</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">StartCoroutine</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">ResumeAfterRecovery</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">recoveryTime</span>, <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>));</div><div class="cm-line">}</div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-layer-above cm-cursorLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: 150; animation-duration: 1200ms;"><div class="cm-cursor cm-cursor-primary" style="left: 6px; top: 5px; height: 16px;"></div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-selectionLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: -2;"></div></div></div></div></div> <div id="plt-canvas-9c38d197-2689-41f4-8dd0-b85de37865cb-479" class="bg-gray-50 dark:bg-[#202123] dark:text-white max-w-full overflow-x-auto scrollbar-hidden"></div> </div> <div class=""></div><hr class="border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#EBEBEB]/16"><h2 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">4.6 Pathing Approach Comparison and Recommendation </h2><h3 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">4.6.1 Options Analysis </h3><div class="relative w-full group/table mb-5"><div class="overflow-x-auto relative w-full scrollbar-hidden"><table class="min-w-full text-sm text-left text-gray-500 w-fit dark:text-gray-400"><thead class="text-gray-700 uppercase border-none dark:text-gray-400"><tr class="border-none bg-[#f7f7f7] dark:bg-[#F7F7F70F]"><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">Approach</div></div> </th><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">Pros</div></div> </th><th scope="col" class="px-3! py-1.5!" style="text-align: null"><div class="gap-1.5 text-left"><div class="break-normal shrink-0">Cons</div></div> </th></tr></thead> <tbody><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null"><strong>NavMesh</strong></td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Built-in Unity support; handles complex geometry</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Not designed for high-speed dynamic targets; doesn't account for momentum</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null"><strong>Waypoint Network</strong></td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Designer control; predictable</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Requires manual authoring; inflexible</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null"><em><em>A</em> Grid</em>*</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Flexible; finds optimal paths</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Grid resolution vs performance tradeoff; doesn't account for momentum</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null"><strong>Local Steering (Reynolds)</strong></td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Handles momentum; emergent behavior; real-time</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">No global pathfinding; can get stuck</td> </tr><tr class="border-b-1 border-[#d1d5dc] dark:border-gray-850"><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null"><strong>Hybrid (Steering + Waypoints)</strong></td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">Combines global guidance with local physics</td><td class="px-3! py-3! border-none text-gray-900 dark:text-white border border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#FFFFFF0D] max-w-[500px] min-w-[180px]" style="text-align: null">More complex to implement</td> </tr></tbody></table></div> <button class="absolute top-1 right-1 z-10 p-1.5 rounded-lg </p><ul dir="auto"><li class="text-start"> Agility courses are relatively simple geometry (no complex navigation)</li><li class="text-start"> Dog movement is fundamentally about momentum and turning, not pathfinding</li><li class="text-start"> Obstacles provide natural waypoints</li><li class="text-start"> Steering behaviors provide realistic movement</li> </ul><div class=""></div><p dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c"><strong>Implementation:</strong> </p><div class=""></div><div class="relative my-2 flex flex-col rounded-xl border border-[#0000000A] bg-[#F7F7F7] dark:bg-[#202123] p-2" overflow-hidden"><div class="h-full w-full"><div class="cm-editor ͼ1 ͼ2 ͼ4 ͼ8l ͼ5k"><div class="cm-announced" aria-live="polite"></div><div tabindex="-1" class="cm-scroller"><div spellcheck="false" autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="off" writingsuggestions="false" translate="no" contenteditable="false" class="cm-content" role="textbox" aria-multiline="true" style="tab-size: 4;"><div class="cm-line">┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐</div><div class="cm-line">│                  HYBRID STEERING SYSTEM                    │</div><div class="cm-line">├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤</div><div class="cm-line">│                                                            │</div><div class="cm-line">│  Global Layer (Where to go):                               │</div><div class="cm-line">│  ├── Target obstacle provides goal position               │</div><div class="cm-line">│  ├── Handler position provides influence                  │</div><div class="cm-line">│  └── Course boundaries provide avoidance                  │</div><div class="cm-line">│                                                            │</div><div class="cm-line">│  Local Layer (How to move):                                │</div><div class="cm-line">│  ├── Seek: Move toward target                             │</div><div class="cm-line">│  ├── Arrive: Slow down when approaching                   │</div><div class="cm-line">│  ├── Avoid: Steer away from obstacles/boundaries          │</div><div class="cm-line">│  ├── Follow Path: Follow calculated approach curve        │</div><div class="cm-line">│  └── Momentum: Respect current velocity and turn limits   │</div><div class="cm-line">│                                                            │</div><div class="cm-line">│  Integration:                                              │</div><div class="cm-line">│  1. Calculate desired velocity from steering forces       │</div><div class="cm-line">│  2. Apply acceleration/deceleration limits                │</div><div class="cm-line">│  3. Apply turn rate limits                                │</div><div class="cm-line">│  4. Output: Final velocity for this frame                 │</div><div class="cm-line">│                                                            │</div><div class="cm-line">└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘</div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-layer-above cm-cursorLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: 150; animation-duration: 1200ms;"><div class="cm-cursor cm-cursor-primary" style="left: 6px; top: 5px; height: 16px;"></div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-selectionLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: -2;"></div></div></div></div></div> <div id="plt-canvas-9c38d197-2689-41f4-8dd0-b85de37865cb-491" class="bg-gray-50 dark:bg-[#202123] dark:text-white max-w-full overflow-x-auto scrollbar-hidden"></div> </div> <div class=""></div><hr class="border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#EBEBEB]/16"><h2 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">4.7 Local Steering Design </h2><h3 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">4.7.1 Steering Forces </h3><div class="relative my-2 flex flex-col rounded-xl border border-[#0000000A] bg-[#F7F7F7] dark:bg-[#202123] p-2" dir="ltr"><div class="absolute pl-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium text-text-300 dark:text-white">csharp</div> <div class="sticky top-8 mb-1 flex items-center justify-end z-11 text-xs text-black dark:text-white"><div class="flex items-center class="cm-editor ͼ1 ͼ2 ͼ4 ͼ8m ͼ5k"><div class="cm-announced" aria-live="polite"></div><div tabindex="-1" class="cm-scroller"><div spellcheck="false" autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="off" writingsuggestions="false" translate="no" contenteditable="false" class="cm-content" role="textbox" aria-multiline="true" data-language="csharp" style="tab-size: 4;"><div class="cm-line"><span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span> <span class="ͼ5m">CalculateSteeringForce</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">DogContext</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>)</div><div class="cm-line">{</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span> <span class="ͼ5m">steering</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">zero</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Seek target obstacle entry</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span> <span class="ͼ5m">seekForce</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">CalculateSeek</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">TargetPosition</span>, <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>);</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">steering</span> <span class="ͼ5q">+=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">seekForce</span> <span class="ͼ5q">*</span> <span class="ͼ5n">1.0f</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Arrive (slow down near target)</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span> <span class="ͼ5m">arriveForce</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">CalculateArrive</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">TargetPosition</span>, <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>);</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">steering</span> <span class="ͼ5q">+=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">arriveForce</span> <span class="ͼ5q">*</span> <span class="ͼ5n">0.8f</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Avoid obstacles (not current target)</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span> <span class="ͼ5m">avoidForce</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">CalculateObstacleAvoidance</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">context</span>);</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">steering</span> <span class="ͼ5q">+=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">avoidForce</span> <span class="ͼ5q">*</span> <span class="ͼ5n">1.5f</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Stay within course boundaries</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span> <span class="ͼ5m">boundaryForce</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">CalculateBoundaryAvoidance</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">context</span>);</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">steering</span> <span class="ͼ5q">+=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">boundaryForce</span> <span class="ͼ5q">*</span> <span class="ͼ5n">2.0f</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Handler influence (follow handler's motion)</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span> <span class="ͼ5m">handlerForce</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">CalculateHandlerInfluence</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">context</span>);</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">steering</span> <span class="ͼ5q">+=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">handlerForce</span> <span class="ͼ5q">*</span> <span class="ͼ5n">0.5f</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">return</span> <span class="ͼ5m">steering</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">}</div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-layer-above cm-cursorLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: 150; animation-duration: 1200ms;"><div class="cm-cursor cm-cursor-primary" style="left: 6px; top: 5px; height: 16px;"></div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-selectionLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: -2;"></div></div></div></div></div> <div id="plt-canvas-9c38d197-2689-41f4-8dd0-b85de37865cb-496" class="bg-gray-50 dark:bg-[#202123] dark:text-white max-w-full w-full"><div class="cm-editor ͼ1 ͼ2 ͼ4 ͼ8o ͼ5k"><div class="cm-announced" aria-live="polite"></div><div tabindex="-1" class="cm-scroller"><div spellcheck="false" autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="off" writingsuggestions="false" translate="no" contenteditable="false" class="cm-content" role="textbox" aria-multiline="true" data-language="csharp" style="tab-size: 4;"><div class="cm-line"><span class="ͼ5s">private</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span> <span class="ͼ5m">CalculateArrive</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span> <span class="ͼ5m">target</span>, <span class="ͼ5m">DogContext</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>)</div><div class="cm-line">{</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span> <span class="ͼ5m">toTarget</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">target</span> <span class="ͼ5q">-</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">DogPosition</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">distance</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">toTarget</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">magnitude</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">if</span> (<span class="ͼ5m">distance</span> <span class="ͼ5q">&lt;</span> <span class="ͼ5n">0.1f</span>)</div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5s">return</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">zero</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">slowRadius</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5n">3.0f</span>; <span class="ͼ5l">// Start slowing at 3 meters</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">targetSpeed</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Breed</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">TopSpeed</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">if</span> (<span class="ͼ5m">distance</span> <span class="ͼ5q">&lt;</span> <span class="ͼ5m">slowRadius</span>)</div><div class="cm-line">    {</div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5m">targetSpeed</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Breed</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">TopSpeed</span> <span class="ͼ5q">*</span> (<span class="ͼ5m">distance</span> <span class="ͼ5q">/</span> <span class="ͼ5m">slowRadius</span>);</div><div class="cm-line">    }</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span> <span class="ͼ5m">desiredVelocity</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">toTarget</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">normalized</span> <span class="ͼ5q">*</span> <span class="ͼ5m">targetSpeed</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">return</span> <span class="ͼ5m">desiredVelocity</span> <span class="ͼ5q">-</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">DogVelocity</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">}</div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-layer-above cm-cursorLayer" contenteditable="false" class="cm-content" role="textbox" aria-multiline="true" data-language="csharp" style="tab-size: 4;"><div class="cm-line"><span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span> <span class="ͼ5m">ApplyMomentumConstraints</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span> <span class="ͼ5m">desiredVelocity</span>, <span class="ͼ5m">DogContext</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>)</div><div class="cm-line">{</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Calculate desired change in velocity</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span> <span class="ͼ5m">velocityChange</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">desiredVelocity</span> <span class="ͼ5q">-</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">DogVelocity</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Limit acceleration</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">maxAcceleration</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Breed</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Acceleration</span> <span class="ͼ5q">*</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Time</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">deltaTime</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">if</span> (<span class="ͼ5m">velocityChange</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">magnitude</span> <span class="ͼ5q">&gt;</span> <span class="ͼ5m">maxAcceleration</span>)</div><div class="cm-line">    {</div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5m">velocityChange</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">velocityChange</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">normalized</span> <span class="ͼ5q">*</span> <span class="ͼ5m">maxAcceleration</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    }</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Apply change</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span> <span class="ͼ5m">newVelocity</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">DogVelocity</span> <span class="ͼ5q">+</span> <span class="ͼ5m">velocityChange</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5l">// Limit turn rate based on speed</span></div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">currentSpeed</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">DogVelocity</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">magnitude</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">maxTurnRate</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Breed</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">GetMaxTurnRate</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">currentSpeed</span>);</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">currentHeading</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Mathf</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Atan2</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">DogVelocity</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">x</span>, <span class="ͼ5m">context</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">DogVelocity</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">z</span>);</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">desiredHeading</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Mathf</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Atan2</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">newVelocity</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">x</span>, <span class="ͼ5m">newVelocity</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">z</span>);</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">headingDifference</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Mathf</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">DeltaAngle</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">currentHeading</span> <span class="ͼ5q">*</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Mathf</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Rad2Deg</span>, <span class="ͼ5m">desiredHeading</span> <span class="ͼ5q">*</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Mathf</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Rad2Deg</span>) <span class="ͼ5q">*</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Mathf</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Deg2Rad</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">if</span> (<span class="ͼ5m">Mathf</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Abs</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">headingDifference</span>) <span class="ͼ5q">&gt;</span> <span class="ͼ5m">maxTurnRate</span> <span class="ͼ5q">*</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Time</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">deltaTime</span>)</div><div class="cm-line">    {</div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5l">// Clamp turn</span></div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">clampedHeading</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">currentHeading</span> <span class="ͼ5q">+</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Mathf</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Sign</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">headingDifference</span>) <span class="ͼ5q">*</span> <span class="ͼ5m">maxTurnRate</span> <span class="ͼ5q">*</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Time</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">deltaTime</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5m">newVelocity</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5s">new</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span>(</div><div class="cm-line">            <span class="ͼ5m">Mathf</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Sin</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">clampedHeading</span>) <span class="ͼ5q">*</span> <span class="ͼ5m">newVelocity</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">magnitude</span>,</div><div class="cm-line">            <span class="ͼ5n">0</span>,</div><div class="cm-line">            <span class="ͼ5m">Mathf</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Cos</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">clampedHeading</span>) <span class="ͼ5q">*</span> <span class="ͼ5m">newVelocity</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">magnitude</span></div><div class="cm-line">        );</div><div class="cm-line">    }</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">return</span> <span class="ͼ5m">newVelocity</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">}</div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-layer-above cm-cursorLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: 150; animation-duration: 1200ms;"><div class="cm-cursor cm-cursor-primary" style="left: 6px; top: 5px; height: 16px;"></div></div><div spellcheck="false" autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="off" writingsuggestions="false" translate="no" contenteditable="false" class="cm-content" role="textbox" aria-multiline="true" data-language="csharp" style="tab-size: 4;"><div class="cm-line"><span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5s">class</span> <span class="ͼ5m">ContactZoneDetector</span> : <span class="ͼ5m">MonoBehaviour</span></div><div class="cm-line">{</div><div class="cm-line">    [<span class="ͼ5m">SerializeField</span>] <span class="ͼ5s">private</span> <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">_zoneHeight</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5n">0.1f</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    [<span class="ͼ5m">SerializeField</span>] <span class="ͼ5s">private</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span> <span class="ͼ5m">_zoneCenter</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    [<span class="ͼ5m">SerializeField</span>] <span class="ͼ5s">private</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span> <span class="ͼ5m">_zoneSize</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">private</span> <span class="ͼ5o">bool</span> <span class="ͼ5m">_contactMade</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5s">false</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5o">bool</span> <span class="ͼ5m">CheckContact</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">DogAgentController</span> <span class="ͼ5m">dog</span>)</div><div class="cm-line">    {</div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5l">// Get dog foot positions</span></div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span>[] <span class="ͼ5m">feetPositions</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">dog</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">GetFeetPositions</span>();</div><div class="cm-line">        </div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5s">foreach</span> (<span class="ͼ5s">var</span> <span class="ͼ5m">foot</span> <span class="ͼ5s">in</span> <span class="ͼ5m">feetPositions</span>)</div><div class="cm-line">        {</div><div class="cm-line">            <span class="ͼ5l">// Check if foot is within contact zone</span></div><div class="cm-line">            <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span> <span class="ͼ5m">localFoot</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">transform</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">InverseTransformPoint</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">foot</span>);</div><div class="cm-line">            </div><div class="cm-line">            <span class="ͼ5s">if</span> (<span class="ͼ5m">localFoot</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">y</span> <span class="ͼ5q">&lt;=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">_zoneHeight</span> <span class="ͼ5q">&amp;&amp;</span></div><div class="cm-line">                <span class="ͼ5m">Mathf</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Abs</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">localFoot</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">x</span> <span class="ͼ5q">-</span> <span class="ͼ5m">_zoneCenter</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">x</span>) <span class="ͼ5q">&lt;=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">_zoneSize</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">x</span> <span class="ͼ5q">*</span> <span class="ͼ5n">0.5f</span> <span class="ͼ5q">&amp;&amp;</span></div><div class="cm-line">                <span class="ͼ5m">Mathf</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Abs</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">localFoot</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">z</span> <span class="ͼ5q">-</span> <span class="ͼ5m">_zoneCenter</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">z</span>) <span class="ͼ5q">&lt;=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">_zoneSize</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">z</span> <span class="ͼ5q">*</span> <span class="ͼ5n">0.5f</span>)</div><div class="cm-line">            {</div><div class="cm-line">                <span class="ͼ5m">_contactMade</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5s">true</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">                <span class="ͼ5s">return</span> <span class="ͼ5s">true</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">            }</div><div class="cm-line">        }</div><div class="cm-line">        </div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5s">return</span> <span class="ͼ5s">false</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    }</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5s">void</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Reset</span>()</div><div class="cm-line">    {</div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5m">_contactMade</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5s">false</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    }</div><div class="cm-line">}</div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-layer-above cm-cursorLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: 150; autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="off" writingsuggestions="false" translate="no" contenteditable="false" class="cm-content" role="textbox" aria-multiline="true" data-language="csharp" style="tab-size: 4;"><div class="cm-line"><span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5s">class</span> <span class="ͼ5m">BarJumpDetector</span> : <span class="ͼ5m">MonoBehaviour</span></div><div class="cm-line">{</div><div class="cm-line">    [<span class="ͼ5m">SerializeField</span>] <span class="ͼ5s">private</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Rigidbody</span> <span class="ͼ5m">_bar</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    [<span class="ͼ5m">SerializeField</span>] <span class="ͼ5s">private</span> <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">_knockThreshold</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5n">2.0f</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    [<span class="ͼ5m">SerializeField</span>] <span class="ͼ5s">private</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Transform</span> <span class="ͼ5m">_barRestPosition</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">private</span> <span class="ͼ5o">bool</span> <span class="ͼ5m">_barKnocked</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5s">false</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5s">void</span> <span class="ͼ5m">CheckForKnock</span>()</div><div class="cm-line">    {</div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5l">// Check if bar has moved from rest position</span></div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">displacement</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Distance</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">_bar</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">position</span>, <span class="ͼ5m">_barRestPosition</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">position</span>);</div><div class="cm-line">        </div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5s">if</span> (<span class="ͼ5m">displacement</span> <span class="ͼ5q">&gt;</span> <span class="ͼ5m">_knockThreshold</span>)</div><div class="cm-line">        {</div><div class="cm-line">            <span class="ͼ5m">_barKnocked</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5s">true</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">            <span class="ͼ5l">// Trigger fault event</span></div><div class="cm-line">            <span class="ͼ5m">EventBus</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Publish</span>(<span class="ͼ5s">new</span> <span class="ͼ5m">FaultEvent</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">FaultType</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">BarKnock</span>, <span class="ͼ5m">Time</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">time</span>));</div><div class="cm-line">        }</div><div class="cm-line">    }</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5o">bool</span> <span class="ͼ5m">IsKnocked</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=&gt;</span> <span class="ͼ5m">_barKnocked</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5s">void</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Reset</span>()</div><div class="cm-line">    {</div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5m">_barKnocked</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5s">false</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5m">_bar</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">position</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">_barRestPosition</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">position</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5m">_bar</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">rotation</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">_barRestPosition</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">rotation</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5m">_bar</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">velocity</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">zero</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5m">_bar</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">angularVelocity</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">zero</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    }</div><div class="cm-line">}</div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-layer-above cm-cursorLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: 150; animation-duration: 1200ms;"><div class="cm-cursor cm-cursor-primary" </div><h3 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">4.10.2 Breed Descriptions </h3><p dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c"><strong>Border Collie:</strong> High speed, wide turns, high handler sensitivity, good independence. Excels at distance handling. Forgiving approach angles. May override handler if confident. </p><div class=""></div><p dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c"><strong>Shetland Sheepdog:</strong> Moderate speed, tight turns, maximum handler sensitivity, low independence. Excels at technical courses. Requires precise handling. Tightly collects for turns. </p><div class=""></div><p dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c"><strong>Australian Shepherd:</strong> Balanced speed and turning. Good all-around performer. Moderate independence. </p><div class=""></div><p dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c"><strong>Jack Russell Terrier:</strong> Quick acceleration, tight turns, lower handler sensitivity, high independence. Fast but may "do its own thing." Excitable, may have lower contact zone accuracy. </p><div class=""></div><p dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c"><strong>Golden Retriever:</strong> Steady speed, forgiving but wide turns, moderate sensitivity. Reliable but not the fastest. Good for beginners. </p><div class=""></div><hr class="border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#EBEBEB]/16"><h2 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">4.11 Formulas and Parameter Tables </h2><h3 dir="auto" writingsuggestions="false" translate="no" contenteditable="false" class="cm-content" role="textbox" aria-multiline="true" style="tab-size: 4;"><div class="cm-line">TurnRadius(speed) = BaseTurnRadius * (1 + (speed / TopSpeed) * TurnExpansionFactor)</div><div class="cm-line"><br></div><div class="cm-line">Where:</div><div class="cm-line">  BaseTurnRadius = minimum turning radius at low speed</div><div class="cm-line">  TurnExpansionFactor = how much turn radius increases with speed (typically 0.5-1.5)</div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-layer-above cm-cursorLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: 150; animation-duration: 1200ms;"><div class="cm-cursor cm-cursor-primary" style="left: 6px; top: 5px; height: 16px;"></div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-selectionLayer" rounded-b-lg overflow-hidden"><div class="h-full w-full"><div class="cm-editor ͼ1 ͼ2 ͼ4 ͼ8w ͼ5k"><div class="cm-announced" aria-live="polite"></div><div tabindex="-1" class="cm-scroller"><div spellcheck="false" autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="off" writingsuggestions="false" translate="no" contenteditable="false" class="cm-content" role="textbox" aria-multiline="true" style="tab-size: 4;"><div class="cm-line">TraversalTime = BaseTraversalTime * (1 + SpeedFactor * (EntrySpeed / TopSpeed - OptimalSpeedRatio))</div><div class="cm-line"><br></div><div class="cm-line">Where:</div><div class="cm-line">  BaseTraversalTime = time for obstacle at optimal speed</div><div class="cm-line">  SpeedFactor = how much speed affects traversal (typically 0.2-0.5)</div><div class="cm-line">  OptimalSpeedRatio = best speed ratio for obstacle (typically 0.7-0.9)</div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-layer-above cm-cursorLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: 150; animation-duration: 1200ms;"><div class="cm-cursor cm-cursor-primary" style="left: 6px; top: 5px; height: 16px;"></div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-selectionLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: -2;"></div></div></div></div></div> <div id="plt-canvas-9c38d197-2689-41f4-8dd0-b85de37865cb-547" class="bg-gray-50 dark:bg-[#202123] dark:text-white max-w-full overflow-x-auto scrollbar-hidden"></div> </div> <div class=""></div><h3 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">4.11.3 Commitment Distance </h3><div class="relative my-2 flex flex-col rounded-xl border border-[#0000000A] autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="off" writingsuggestions="false" translate="no" contenteditable="false" class="cm-content" role="textbox" aria-multiline="true" style="tab-size: 4;"><div class="cm-line">CommitmentDistance = BaseCommitmentDistance * (1 + SpeedRatio * 0.5) * ConfidenceModifier</div><div class="cm-line"><br></div><div class="cm-line">Where:</div><div class="cm-line">  SpeedRatio = current speed / top speed</div><div class="cm-line">  ConfidenceModifier = based on dog's confidence level (0.8-1.2)</div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-layer-above cm-cursorLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: 150; animation-duration: 1200ms;"><div class="cm-cursor cm-cursor-primary" style="left: 6px; top: 5px; height: 16px;"></div></div><div class="cm-layer YPS</div><div class="cm-line">  Intermediate: 3.0 YPS</div><div class="cm-line">  Advanced: 3.5 YPS</div><div class="cm-line">  Masters: 4.0 YPS</div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-layer-above 4;"><div class="cm-line"><span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5s">class</span> <span class="ͼ5m">DogAIDebugVisualizer</span> : <span class="ͼ5m">MonoBehaviour</span></div><div class="cm-line">{</div><div class="cm-line">    [<span class="ͼ5m">Header</span>(<span class="ͼ5p">"Visualization Toggles"</span>)]</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5o">bool</span> <span class="ͼ5m">ShowState</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5s">true</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5o">bool</span> <span class="ͼ5m">ShowTarget</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5s">true</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5o">bool</span> <span class="ͼ5m">ShowPath</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5s">true</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5o">bool</span> <span class="ͼ5m">ShowPerception</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5s">true</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5o">bool</span> <span class="ͼ5m">ShowObstacleScores</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5s">true</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5o">bool</span> <span class="ͼ5m">ShowCommandQueue</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5s">true</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">private</span> <span class="ͼ5m">DogAgentController</span> <span class="ͼ5m">_dog</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">private</span> <span class="ͼ5s">void</span> <span class="ͼ5m">OnDrawGizmos</span>()</div><div class="cm-line">    {</div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5s">if</span> (<span class="ͼ5q">!</span><span class="ͼ5m">Application</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">isPlaying</span> <span class="ͼ5q">||</span> <span class="ͼ5m">_dog</span> <span class="ͼ5q">==</span> <span class="ͼ5s">null</span>) <span class="ͼ5s">return</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">        </div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5l">// State label</span></div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5s">if</span> (<span class="ͼ5m">ShowState</span>)</div><div class="cm-line">        {</div><div class="cm-line">            <span class="ͼ5m">UnityEditor</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Handles</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Label</span>(</div><div class="cm-line">                <span class="ͼ5m">_dog</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Position</span> <span class="ͼ5q">+</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">up</span> <span class="ͼ5q">*</span> <span class="ͼ5n">2f</span>,</div><div class="cm-line">                <span class="ͼ5m">$</span><span class="ͼ5p">"State: {_dog.CurrentState}\n"</span> <span class="ͼ5q">+</span></div><div class="cm-line">                <span class="ͼ5m">$</span><span class="ͼ5p">"Speed: {_dog.Speed:F1} m/s\n"</span> <span class="ͼ5q">+</span></div><div class="cm-line">                <span class="ͼ5m">$</span><span class="ͼ5p">"Target: {(_dog.CurrentTarget?.ObstacleName ?? "</span><span class="ͼ5m">None</span><span class="ͼ5p">")}"</span></div><div class="cm-line">            );</div><div class="cm-line">        }</div><div class="cm-line">        </div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5l">// Target line</span></div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5s">if</span> (<span class="ͼ5m">ShowTarget</span> <span class="ͼ5q">&amp;&amp;</span> <span class="ͼ5m">_dog</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">CurrentTarget</span> <span class="ͼ5q">!=</span> <span class="ͼ5s">null</span>)</div><div class="cm-line">        {</div><div class="cm-line">            <span class="ͼ5m">Gizmos</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">color</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Color</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">green</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">            <span class="ͼ5m">Gizmos</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">DrawLine</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">_dog</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Position</span>, <span class="ͼ5m">_dog</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">CurrentTarget</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Position</span>);</div><div class="cm-line">        }</div><div class="cm-line">        </div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5l">// Perception radius</span></div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5s">if</span> (<span class="ͼ5m">ShowPerception</span>)</div><div class="cm-gap" style="height: 308px;"></div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-layer-above cm-cursorLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: 150; animation-duration: 1200ms;"><div class="cm-cursor cm-cursor-primary" style="left: 6px; top: 5px; height: 16px;"></div></div><div class="cm-announced" aria-live="polite"></div><div tabindex="-1" class="cm-scroller"><div spellcheck="false" autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="off" writingsuggestions="false" translate="no" contenteditable="false" class="cm-content" role="textbox" aria-multiline="true" data-language="csharp" style="tab-size: 4;"><div class="cm-line"><span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5s">class</span> <span class="ͼ5m">CourseFlowValidator</span> : <span class="ͼ5m">MonoBehaviour</span></div><div class="cm-line">{</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5m">CourseData</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Course</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5m">DogBreedData</span> <span class="ͼ5m">TestBreed</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    [<span class="ͼ5m">ContextMenu</span>(<span class="ͼ5p">"Validate Course Flow"</span>)]</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5s">void</span> <span class="ͼ5m">ValidateFlow</span>()</div><div class="cm-line">    {</div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5s">var</span> <span class="ͼ5m">results</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5s">new</span> <span class="ͼ5m">List</span><span class="ͼ5q">&lt;</span><span class="ͼ5m">FlowValidationResult</span><span class="ͼ5q">&gt;</span>();</div><div class="cm-line">        </div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5s">for</span> (<span class="ͼ5o">int</span> <span class="ͼ5m">i</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5n">0</span>; <span class="ͼ5m">i</span> <span class="ͼ5q">&lt;</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Course</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Obstacles</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Count</span> <span class="ͼ5q">-</span> <span class="ͼ5n">1</span>; <span class="ͼ5m">i</span><span class="ͼ5q">++</span>)</div><div class="cm-line">        {</div><div class="cm-line">            <span class="ͼ5s">var</span> <span class="ͼ5m">current</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Course</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Obstacles</span>[<span class="ͼ5m">i</span>];</div><div class="cm-line">            <span class="ͼ5s">var</span> <span class="ͼ5m">next</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Course</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Obstacles</span>[<span class="ͼ5m">i</span> <span class="ͼ5q">+</span> <span class="ͼ5n">1</span>];</div><div class="cm-line">            </div><div class="cm-line">            <span class="ͼ5l">// Calculate distance</span></div><div class="cm-line">            <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">distance</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Distance</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">current</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Position</span>, <span class="ͼ5m">next</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Position</span>);</div><div class="cm-line">            </div><div class="cm-line">            <span class="ͼ5l">// Calculate turn angle</span></div><div class="cm-line">            <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span> <span class="ͼ5m">exitDir</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">current</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Obstacle</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">GetExitDirection</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">next</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Position</span>);</div><div class="cm-line">            <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span> <span class="ͼ5m">entryDir</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">next</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Obstacle</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">GetEntryDirection</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">current</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Position</span>);</div><div class="cm-line">            <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">turnAngle</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">Vector3</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Angle</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">exitDir</span>, <span class="ͼ5m">entryDir</span>);</div><div class="cm-line">            </div><div class="cm-line">            <span class="ͼ5l">// Check if turn is possible at expected speed</span></div><div class="cm-line">            <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">expectedSpeed</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">TestBreed</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">TopSpeed</span> <span class="ͼ5q">*</span> <span class="ͼ5n">0.8f</span>;</div><div class="cm-line">            <span class="ͼ5o">float</span> <span class="ͼ5m">maxTurnAngle</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">TestBreed</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">GetMaxTurnAngle</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">expectedSpeed</span>);</div><div class="cm-line">            </div><div class="cm-line">            <span class="ͼ5s">var</span> <span class="ͼ5m">result</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5s">new</span> <span class="ͼ5m">FlowValidationResult</span></div><div class="cm-line">            {</div><div class="cm-line">                <span class="ͼ5m">FromObstacle</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">current</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Obstacle</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">ObstacleName</span>,</div><div class="cm-line">                <span class="ͼ5m">ToObstacle</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">next</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Obstacle</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">ObstacleName</span>,</div><div class="cm-line">                <span class="ͼ5m">Distance</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">distance</span>,</div><div class="cm-line">                <span class="ͼ5m">TurnAngle</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">turnAngle</span>,</div><div class="cm-line">                <span class="ͼ5m">IsValid</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">turnAngle</span> <span class="ͼ5q">&lt;=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">maxTurnAngle</span>,</div><div class="cm-line">                <span class="ͼ5m">Warning</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">turnAngle</span> <span class="ͼ5q">&gt;</span> <span class="ͼ5m">maxTurnAngle</span> <span class="ͼ5q">?</span> </div><div class="cm-line">                    <span class="ͼ5m">$</span><span class="ͼ5p">"Turn too sharp for {TestBreed.BreedName} at expected speed"</span> : <span class="ͼ5s">null</span></div><div class="cm-gap" style="height: 210px;"></div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-layer-above cm-cursorLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: 150; animation-duration: 1200ms;"><div class="cm-cursor cm-cursor-primary" style="left: 6px; top: 5px; height: 16px;"></div></div><div class="cm-layer animation-duration: 1200ms;"><div class="cm-cursor cm-cursor-primary" style="left: 6px; top: 5px; height: 16px;"></div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-selectionLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: -2;"></div></div></div></div></div> <div id="plt-canvas-9c38d197-2689-41f4-8dd0-b85de37865cb-570" class="bg-gray-50 dark:bg-[#202123] dark:text-white max-w-full overflow-x-auto scrollbar-hidden"></div> </div> <div class=""></div><h3 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">5.1.2 Workflow Steps </h3><ol start="1" dir="auto" data-emit-thinking-stage="false" style="padding-left: calc(var(--spacing, .25rem) * 4);"><li class="text-start"><p class="svelte-121hp7c"><strong>Create New Course</strong> </p><ul dir="auto"><li class="text-start"> Set arena dimensions</li><li class="text-start"> Set course type (Standard / Jumpers With Weaves)</li><li class="text-start"> Set difficulty tier</li> </ul> </li><li class="text-start"><p class="svelte-121hp7c"><strong>Place Obstacles</strong> </p><ul dir="auto"><li class="text-start"> Select from palette</li><li class="text-start"> Click to place on canvas</li><li class="text-start"> Drag to reposition</li><li class="text-start"> Rotate with shift-drag or gizmo</li> </ul> </li><li class="text-start"><p class="svelte-121hp7c"><strong>Set Sequence</strong> </p><ul dir="auto"><li class="text-start"> Auto-number by placement order</li><li class="text-start"> Manual reorder via drag-drop list</li><li class="text-start"> Visual arrows show required path</li> </ul> </li><li class="text-start"><p class="svelte-121hp7c"><strong>Configure Obstacles</strong> </p><ul dir="auto"><li class="text-start"> Select obstacle to show inspector</li><li class="text-start"> Set height division if applicable</li><li class="text-start"> Set variant (curved tunnel, bar jump style)</li> </ul> </li><li class="text-start"><p class="svelte-121hp7c"><strong>Validate Course</strong> </p><ul dir="auto"><li class="text-start"> Automatic validation on each change</li><li class="text-start"> Manual full validation button</li><li class="text-start"> Warnings and errors displayed</li> </ul> </li><li class="text-start"><p class="svelte-121hp7c"><strong>Test Run</strong> </p><ul dir="auto"><li class="text-start"> Play mode with debug dog</li><li class="text-start"> Verify flow and timing</li><li class="text-start"> Check for unintended challenges</li> </ul> </li><li class="text-start"><p class="svelte-121hp7c"><strong>Export</strong> </p><ul dir="auto"><li class="text-start"> Save as ScriptableObject</li><li class="text-start"> Export to JSON for version control</li><li class="text-start"> Package with venue for distribution</li> </ul> </li></ol><div class=""></div><hr class="border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#EBEBEB]/16"><h2 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">5.2 Obstacle Validation Tooling </h2><h3 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">5.2.1 Real-Time Validation </h3><div overflow-hidden"><div class="h-full w-full"><div class="cm-editor ͼ1 ͼ2 ͼ4 ͼ99 ͼ5k"><div class="cm-announced" aria-live="polite"></div><div tabindex="-1" class="cm-scroller"><div spellcheck="false" autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="off" writingsuggestions="false" translate="no" contenteditable="false" class="cm-content" role="textbox" aria-multiline="true" style="tab-size: 4;"><div class="cm-line">┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐</div><div class="cm-line">│               EASTWORLD GENERATION PIPELINE                │</div><div class="cm-line">├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤</div><div class="cm-line">│                                                            │</div><div class="cm-line">│  1. BATCH REQUEST                                          │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── Define generation scope (50 lines per event type) │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── Define variables and constraints                  │</div><div class="cm-line">│     └── Submit to Eastworld API                           │</div><div class="cm-line">│                                                            │</div><div class="cm-line">│  2. GENERATION                                             │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── Eastworld generates line variants                 │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── Lines tagged with metadata                        │</div><div class="cm-line">│     └── Output as JSON batch                              │</div><div class="cm-line">│                                                            │</div><div class="cm-line">│  3. REVIEW                                                 │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── Import to Unity editor                            │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── Display in review queue                           │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── Designer approves/rejects/edits                   │</div><div class="cm-line">│     └── Approved lines move to production queue           │</div><div class="cm-line">│                                                            │</div><div class="cm-line">│  4. VO GENERATION                                          │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── Send approved text to ElevenLabs                  │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── Select voice profile per role                     │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── Generate audio files                              │</div><div class="cm-line">│     └── Import to Unity as AudioClips                     │</div><div class="cm-line">│                                                            │</div><div class="cm-line">│  5. INTEGRATION                                            │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── Create CommentaryLineDefinition assets            │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── Link text + audio                                 │</div><div class="cm-line">│     └── Add to CommentaryDatabase                         │</div><div class="cm-line">│                                                            │</div><div class="cm-line">│  6. TESTING                                                │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── Playtest commentary in-game                       │</div><div class="cm-line">│     ├── Verify triggers and timing                        │</div><div class="cm-line">│     └── Flag lines for revision                           │</div><div class="cm-line">│                                                            │</div><div class="cm-gap" style="height: 14px;"></div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-layer-above cm-cursorLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: 150; animation-duration: 1200ms;"><div class="cm-cursor cm-cursor-primary" style="left: 6px; top: 5px; height: 16px;"></div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-selectionLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: -2;"></div></div></div></div></div> <div id="plt-canvas-9c38d197-2689-41f4-8dd0-b85de37865cb-613" class="bg-gray-50 dark:bg-[#202123] dark:text-white max-w-full overflow-x-auto rounded-b-lg overflow-hidden"><div class="h-full w-full"><div class="cm-editor ͼ1 ͼ2 ͼ4 ͼ9a ͼ5k"><div class="cm-announced" aria-live="polite"></div><div tabindex="-1" class="cm-scroller"><div spellcheck="false" autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="off" writingsuggestions="false" translate="no" contenteditable="false" class="cm-content" role="textbox" aria-multiline="true" style="tab-size: 4;"><div class="cm-line">Generate 10 commentary lines for a dog agility competition game.</div><div class="cm-line"><br></div><div class="cm-line">Event: {EventName}</div><div class="cm-line">Context: {ContextDescription}</div><div class="cm-line">Variables available: {VariableList}</div><div class="cm-line">Tone: {ToneDescription}</div><div class="cm-line"><br></div><div class="cm-line">Examples:</div><div class="cm-line">- "{Example1}"</div><div class="cm-line">- "{Example2}"</div><div class="cm-line"><br></div><div class="cm-line">Requirements:</div><div class="cm-line">- Each line should be 1-2 sentences</div><div class="cm-line">- Use variables in [brackets] where appropriate</div><div class="cm-line">- Vary excitement level based on event importance</div><div class="cm-line">- Include breed-appropriate references when [BreedName] is available</div><div class="cm-line"><br></div><div class="cm-line">Output format: JSON array with objects containing "text", "weight", "conditions"</div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-layer-above cm-cursorLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: 150; animation-duration: 1200ms;"><div class="cm-cursor cm-cursor-primary" style="left: 6px; top: 5px; height: 16px;"></div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-selectionLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: overflow-hidden"><div class="h-full w-full"><div class="cm-editor ͼ1 ͼ2 ͼ4 ͼ9b ͼ5k"><div class="cm-announced" aria-live="polite"></div><div tabindex="-1" class="cm-scroller"><div spellcheck="false" autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="off" writingsuggestions="false" translate="no" contenteditable="false" class="cm-content" role="textbox" aria-multiline="true" style="tab-size: 4;"><div class="cm-line">1. Voice Profile Creation (One-time)</div><div class="cm-line">   ├── Record or select base voice</div><div class="cm-line">   ├── Fine-tune for role characteristics</div><div class="cm-line">   ├── Test with sample lines</div><div class="cm-line">   └── Save profile ID</div><div class="cm-line"><br></div><div class="cm-line">2. Batch Generation</div><div class="cm-line">   ├── Prepare text list (approved commentary lines)</div><div class="cm-line">   ├── Submit to ElevenLabs API with profile ID</div><div class="cm-line">   ├── Specify output format (WAV, 44.1kHz, mono)</div><div class="cm-line">   └── Receive audio files</div><div class="cm-line"><br></div><div class="cm-line">3. Post-Processing</div><div class="cm-line">   ├── Normalize volume</div><div class="cm-line">   ├── Trim silence</div><div class="cm-line">   ├── Apply light compression</div><div class="cm-line">   └── Import to Unity</div><div class="cm-line"><br></div><div class="cm-line">4. Quality Check</div><div class="cm-line">   ├── Verify pronunciation</div><div class="cm-line">   ├── Check emotion/tone match</div><div class="cm-line">   ├── Flag for regeneration if needed</div><div class="cm-line">   └── Approve for production</div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-layer-above cm-cursorLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: 150; animation-duration: 1200ms;"><div class="cm-cursor cm-cursor-primary" style="left: 6px; top: 5px; height: 16px;"></div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-selectionLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: -2;"></div></div></div></div></div> <div class="cm-announced" aria-live="polite"></div><div tabindex="-1" class="cm-scroller"><div spellcheck="false" autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="off" writingsuggestions="false" translate="no" contenteditable="false" class="cm-content" role="textbox" aria-multiline="true" data-language="csharp" style="tab-size: 4;"><div class="cm-line"><span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5s">class</span> <span class="ͼ5m">TelemetryService</span> : <span class="ͼ5m">MonoBehaviour</span></div><div class="cm-line">{</div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5s">void</span> <span class="ͼ5m">TrackEvent</span>(<span class="ͼ5o">string</span> <span class="ͼ5m">eventName</span>, <span class="ͼ5m">Dictionary</span><span class="ͼ5q">&lt;</span><span class="ͼ5o">string</span>, <span class="ͼ5o">object</span><span class="ͼ5q">&gt;</span> <span class="ͼ5m">data</span>)</div><div class="cm-line">    {</div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5s">var</span> <span class="ͼ5m">telemetryEvent</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5s">new</span> <span class="ͼ5m">TelemetryEvent</span></div><div class="cm-line">        {</div><div class="cm-line">            <span class="ͼ5m">EventName</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">eventName</span>,</div><div class="cm-line">            <span class="ͼ5m">Timestamp</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5o">DateTime</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">UtcNow</span>,</div><div class="cm-line">            <span class="ͼ5m">SessionId</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">_sessionId</span>,</div><div class="cm-line">            <span class="ͼ5m">Data</span> <span class="ͼ5q">=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">data</span></div><div class="cm-line">        };</div><div class="cm-line">        </div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5l">// Queue for batch upload</span></div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5m">_eventQueue</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Enqueue</span>(<span class="ͼ5m">telemetryEvent</span>);</div><div class="cm-line">        </div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5l">// Flush if queue full</span></div><div class="cm-line">        <span class="ͼ5s">if</span> (<span class="ͼ5m">_eventQueue</span>.<span class="ͼ5m">Count</span> <span class="ͼ5q">&gt;=</span> <span class="ͼ5m">_batchSize</span>)</div><div class="cm-line">        {</div><div class="cm-line">            <span class="ͼ5m">Flush</span>();</div><div class="cm-line">        }</div><div class="cm-line">    }</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    <span class="ͼ5s">public</span> <span class="ͼ5s">void</span> <span dark:border-[#fff]/12"></div></div> <blockquote slot="content" dir="auto" class="text-sm leading-6 text-black/40 dark:text-white/40"><p dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">The user wants the entire PRD package I've been generating (and was about to continue generating) encapsulated in a format they can export, specifically asking for a PDF or inside a code block (<code class="cursor-pointer codespan">CONTENT_HERE</code>). </p><div class=""></div><p dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">Since I cannot directly generate a PDF file, the best approach is to provide the complete text content inside a single, comprehensive markdown code block as requested. This allows the user to copy the entire block and save it as a markdown file (<code class="cursor-pointer codespan">.md</code>) which can then be easily converted to a PDF using any standard markdown-to-PDF converter (like Pandoc, VS Code extensions, or online tools). </p><div class=""></div><p dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">I need to: </p><ol start="1" dir="auto" data-emit-thinking-stage="false" style="padding-left: calc(var(--spacing, .25rem) * 4);"><li class="text-start"><strong>Consolidate:</strong> I have written parts 1 through 5 fully. </li><li class="text-start"><strong>Complete:</strong> I was interrupted while writing section 6 (Production Plan). I need to finish section 6, section 7 (Open Questions), and the final "Output Standards" verification (implied by the prompt, though usually I just deliver the content). </li><li class="text-start"><strong>Format:</strong> Wrap everything in a single code block. </li></ol><div class=""></div><p dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">Let's verify the structure of the full document: </p><ol start="1" dir="auto" data-emit-thinking-stage="false" style="padding-left: calc(var(--spacing, .25rem) * 4);"><li class="text-start">Executive PRD (Done) </li><li class="text-start">Feature Requirements by System (Done) </li><li class="text-start">Unity Technical Architecture (Done) </li><li class="text-start">AI and Physics Deep Spec (Done) </li><li class="text-start">Content and Tooling Plan (Done) </li><li class="text-start">Production Plan (Partially Done - need to finish milestones, team assumptions, risk register, QA, etc.) </li><li class="text-start">Open Questions and Decision Log (Not done yet) </li></ol><div class=""></div><p dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">I will generate the <em>full</em> content inside the requested code block. </p></blockquote></div> </div><div class="markdown"><h1>Westminster Agility Masters: Handler's Edge</h1><h2>Engineering PRD Package</h2><hr><h1>1. Executive PRD</h1><h2>1.1 Product Overview</h2><p><strong>Westminster Agility Masters: Handler's Edge</strong> is a premium dog agility sports simulation where the player controls the <strong>handler</strong> in third-person perspective. The <strong>dog</strong> is an AI-driven athletic partner with systemic intelligence, momentum-aware movement, and breed-specific behaviors.</p><p>This is a sports-sim, not an arcade pet game. The gameplay fantasy centers on reading courses, positioning, timing commands, and managing risk under judged competition conditions.</p><hr><h2>1.2 Game Pillars</h2><table><thead><tr><th>Pillar</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><strong>Handler-First Control</strong></td><td>Player controls the human, not the dog. Mastery comes from positioning, timing, and communication.</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Believable Dog Intelligence</strong></td><td>Dog is a smart athletic partner with momentum, commitment logic, and breed-specific tendencies. Predictable enough for mastery, autonomous enough for realism.</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Authentic Adjudication</strong></td><td>Real fault evaluation, timing, and scoring. Competition rules matter and are visibly enforced.</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Broadcast Presentation</strong></td><td>Sports-broadcast quality cameras, replays, commentary, and crowd energy. Every run should look telegenic.</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Replay Spectacle</strong></td><td>Slow-motion highlights, multi-angle review, and shareable moments are core to the experience.</td></tr></tbody></table><hr><h2>1.3 Target Audience</h2><table><thead><tr><th>Segment</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><strong>Primary</strong></td><td>Agility enthusiasts, dog sport competitors, and sports-sim fans seeking authenticity. Ages 25-55.</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Secondary</strong></td><td>General sports-gaming audience familiar with titles like NBA 2K, FIFA, or golf simulations.</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Tertiary</strong></td><td>Dog lovers seeking a premium, non-arcade experience with depth and realism.</td></tr></tbody></table><hr><h2>1.4 Key Differentiators</h2><table><thead><tr><th>Differentiator</th><th>Competitor Gap</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>Handler control (not dog control)</td><td>No competitor offers this; all existing dog agility games control the dog directly.</td></tr><tr><td>Systemic dog AI with breed traits</td><td>Competitors use simple pathfinding or puppet-style control.</td></tr><tr><td>Authentic fault adjudication</td><td>Competitors simplify or omit fault systems.</td></tr><tr><td>Broadcast replay system</td><td>Competitors lack replay depth and multi-angle presentation.</td></tr><tr><td>Commentary + crowd reactivity</td><td>Competitors treat presentation as afterthought.</td></tr></tbody></table><hr><h2>1.5 Success Metrics</h2><h3>Gameplay Metrics</h3><table><thead><tr><th>Metric</th><th>Target</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>Handler-dog control responsiveness</td><td>Input-to-visible-dog-response latency ≤ 200ms in standard conditions</td></tr><tr><td>Command interpretation accuracy</td><td>≥ 95% of correctly-timed commands produce expected dog behavior in training</td></tr><tr><td>Fault adjudication accuracy</td><td>100% compliance with defined fault rules in test suite</td></tr><tr><td>Replay system reliability</td><td>100% of runs produce valid replay data; 0% replay desync in test harness</td></tr></tbody></table><h3>Technical Metrics</h3><table><thead><tr><th>Metric</th><th>Target</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>Frame rate (PC)</td><td>60fps minimum on recommended spec; 30fps minimum on minimum spec</td></tr><tr><td>Frame rate (WebGL prototype)</td><td>30fps minimum in browser on mid-range hardware</td></tr><tr><td>Load time (first course)</td><td>≤ 15 seconds from main menu to gameplay on recommended spec</td></tr><tr><td>Dog AI decision cycle</td><td>≤ 16ms per frame budget</td></tr><tr><td>Save file integrity</td><td>Zero corrupt save cases in test coverage</td></tr></tbody></table><h3>Engagement/Business Metrics</h3><table><thead><tr><th>Metric</th><th>Target</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>Proof-of-concept conversion</td><td>70% of demo players complete at least 3 full runs</td></tr><tr><td>Career mode engagement</td><td>60% of players who complete training enter career mode</td></tr><tr><td>Replay usage</td><td>40% of players view at least one replay post-run in first session</td></tr><tr><td>Retention (if applicable)</td><td>40% D7 retention in digital release scenario</td></tr></tbody></table><hr><h2>1.6 Explicit Non-Goals / V1 Exclusions</h2><table><thead><tr><th>Exclusion</th><th>Rationale</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>Multiplayer head-to-head</td><td>Scope risk; consider for post-launch.</td></tr><tr><td>Live-service economy</td><td>Not required for v1 premium product.</td></tr><tr><td>Dog breeding/genetics system</td><td>Scope risk; career progression focuses on unlocks, not breeding.</td></tr><tr><td>User-generated course sharing</td><td>Platform complexity; defer to v1.1 or later.</td></tr><tr><td>Real-world venue licensing</td><td>v1 uses fictional venues; licensing for sequel/expansion.</td></tr><tr><td>Full motion-captured handler animation</td><td>Budget risk; v1 uses procedural + keyframe blend; mocap for sequel.</td></tr><tr><td>Voice chat or social features</td><td>Not core to handler-dog fantasy.</td></tr><tr><td>Mobile platform</td><td>Controls and presentation target PC/console; mobile is separate product consideration.</td></tr><tr><td>Real-money transactions</td><td>Premium v1 product; no MTX.</td></tr><tr><td>VR mode</td><td>Significant UX and tech risk; future consideration.</td></tr></tbody></table><hr><h2>1.7 Phase Definitions</h2><h3>Phase A: Proof of Concept</h3><p><strong>Platforms:</strong> Windows, macOS, WebGL (browser)</p><p><strong>Scope:</strong></p><ul><li>Single handler + single dog</li><li>3-5 obstacle types</li><li>2 course layouts</li><li>Basic command system</li><li>Simple timing and fault detection</li><li>Single camera mode</li><li>No commentary, minimal crowd</li><li>Save/load not required</li></ul><p><strong>Exit Criteria:</strong></p><ul><li>Handler-dog loop validated as fun and readable</li><li>Command timing feels skill-based</li><li>Dog behavior is predictable enough for mastery</li><li>Stakeholder/investor demo viable</li></ul><h3>Phase B: Production 1.0</h3><p><strong>Platforms:</strong> Windows, macOS (console architecture preserved)</p><p><strong>Scope:</strong></p><ul><li>Full obstacle set</li><li>Multiple handlers and dogs with breed differentiation</li><li>Career mode with progression</li><li>Full commentary system</li><li>Crowd and presentation layers</li><li>Replay system</li><li>Full adjudication</li><li>Accessibility features</li><li>Localization foundation</li></ul><hr><h1>2. Feature Requirements by System</h1><hr><h2>2.1 Handler Controls and Input System</h2><h3>2.1.1 Overview</h3><p>The handler control system is the player's primary interface with the game. Players control a human handler in third-person view, using analog locomotion, gestures, and contextual commands to direct their dog partner through agility courses.</p><p><strong>Key Design Principle:</strong> The handler never has direct control over the dog. All influence is mediated through positioning, body language, and commands that the dog interprets based on its AI state, training level, and breed characteristics.</p><hr><h3>2.1.2 User Stories</h3><table><thead><tr><th>ID</th><th>User Story</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>H-001</td><td>As a player, I want to move my handler with smooth analog control so I can position myself precisely on course.</td></tr><tr><td>H-002</td><td>As a player, I want to sprint when needed so I can reach critical handling positions in time.</td></tr><tr><td>H-003</td><td>As a player, I want to use arm gestures that the dog can read so I can influence direction at range.</td></tr><tr><td>H-004</td><td>As a player, I want to issue verbal commands so I can direct the dog to specific obstacles.</td></tr><tr><td>H-005</td><td>As a player, I want my body facing to influence dog interpretation so I can shape lines naturally.</td></tr><tr><td>H-006</td><td>As a player, I want optional microphone voice input so I can use real voice commands for immersion.</td></tr><tr><td>H-007</td><td>As a player, I want clear visual feedback on command recognition so I know what the dog perceived.</td></tr><tr><td>H-008</td><td>As a player, I want input latency to be minimal so timing feels precise.</td></tr></tbody></table><hr><h3>2.1.3 Functional Requirements</h3><h4>2.1.3.1 Locomotion</h4><table><thead><tr><th>ID</th><th>Requirement</th><th>Priority</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>H-F001</td><td>Handler must support 8-directional analog movement with full analog speed range (0-1 normalized).</td><td>P0</td></tr><tr><td>H-F002</td><td>Handler must support sprint modifier that increases maximum speed by 60-80% (tunable).</td><td>P0</td></tr><tr><td>H-F003</td><td>Handler must support directional lean input that biases body orientation without full rotation.</td><td>P1</td></tr><tr><td>H-F004</td><td>Handler must accelerate and decelerate with realistic human momentum (not instant velocity changes).</td><td>P0</td></tr><tr><td>H-F005</td><td>Handler must animate appropriately for current velocity and facing (8-way blended animation).</td><td>P0</td></tr><tr><td>H-F006</td><td>Handler must not clip through obstacle boundaries or course barriers.</td><td>P0</td></tr><tr><td>H-F007</td><td>Handler must have configurable maximum speed and acceleration per handler archetype.</td><td>P1</td></tr></tbody></table><h4>2.1.3.2 Gestures and Body Language</h4><table><thead><tr><th>ID</th><th>Requirement</th><th>Priority</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>H-F010</td><td>Handler must support left-arm and right-arm gesture inputs (shoulder buttons or hold + direction).</td><td>P0</td></tr><tr><td>H-F011</td><td>Handler must support "point" gesture that indicates direction to dog.</td><td>P0</td></tr><tr><td>H-F012</td><td>Handler must support "sweep" gesture for wide directional cues.</td><td>P1</td></tr><tr><td>H-F013</td><td>Handler body facing must be independent of movement direction (strafe capability).</td><td>P0</td></tr><tr><td>H-F014</td><td>Handler velocity must factor into dog command interpretation (running away = "go on", running toward = "come").</td><td>P0</td></tr><tr><td>H-F015</td><td>Handler proximity to dog must affect command strength (closer = stronger influence).</td><td>P0</td></tr></tbody></table><h4>2.1.3.3 Commands</h4><table><thead><tr><th>ID</th><th>Requirement</th><th>Priority</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>H-F020</td><td>Handler must be able to issue the following commands via button input: Come Bye, Away, Jump, Tunnel, Weave, Table, Here, Out, Go.</td><td>P0</td></tr><tr><td>H-F021</td><td>Command inputs must be mapped to a radial or chorded input scheme for accessibility.</td><td>P0</td></tr><tr><td>H-F022</td><td>Commands must be displayed visually when issued (floating text or icon near handler).</td><td>P0</td></tr><tr><td>H-F023</td><td>Commands must trigger handler voice audio ("Come bye!", "Tunnel!", etc.).</td><td>P1</td></tr><tr><td>H-F024</td><td>Command timing must be recorded for replay and telemetry.</td><td>P0</td></tr></tbody></table><h4>2.1.3.4 Voice Input (Optional)</h4><table><thead><tr><th>ID</th><th>Requirement</th><th>Priority</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>H-F030</td><td>System must optionally accept microphone input for voice commands.</td><td>P2</td></tr><tr><td>H-F031</td><td>Voice commands must be matched against a predefined phrase list with tolerance for accent/variation.</td><td>P2</td></tr><tr><td>H-F032</td><td>Voice recognition confidence threshold must be configurable by player.</td><td>P2</td></tr><tr><td>H-F033</td><td>Voice input must show visual feedback (listening indicator, recognized command).</td><td>P2</td></tr><tr><td>H-F034</td><td>Voice input must fall back gracefully if microphone unavailable or recognition fails.</td><td>P2</td></tr><tr><td>H-F035</td><td>Voice input latency must not exceed 300ms from speech end to command issue.</td><td>P2</td></tr></tbody></table><hr><h3>2.1.4 Non-Functional Requirements</h3><table><thead><tr><th>ID</th><th>Requirement</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>H-NF001</td><td>Input polling must occur at application frame rate; no frame-delayed input processing.</td></tr><tr><td>H-NF002</td><td>Input-to-visible-response latency must not exceed 100ms for locomotion, 200ms for dog command interpretation.</td></tr><tr><td>H-NF003</td><td>Input bindings must be fully rebindable via settings UI.</td></tr><tr><td>H-NF004</td><td>Default bindings must match industry-standard sports game layouts (left stick move, right stick camera, triggers for gestures).</td></tr><tr><td>H-NF005</td><td>All inputs must be compatible with keyboard + mouse, gamepad, and accessibility peripherals.</td></tr><tr><td>H-NF006</td><td>Input system must support Unity Input System package (not legacy input).</td></tr></tbody></table><hr><h3>2.1.5 Dependencies</h3><table><thead><tr><th>Dependency</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>Dog AI System</td><td>Command interpretation requires dog AI to receive and process commands.</td></tr><tr><td>Camera System</td><td>Third-person camera must follow handler smoothly without obscuring course view.</td></tr><tr><td>Animation System</td><td>Handler animations must exist for all locomotion and gesture states.</td></tr><tr><td>Audio System</td><td>Handler voice clips required for command callouts.</td></tr><tr><td>Accessibility System</td><td>Input remapping and alternative control schemes must integrate with accessibility settings.</td></tr></tbody></table><hr><h3>2.1.6 Edge Cases / Failure States</h3><table><thead><tr><th>Edge Case</th><th>Resolution</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>Handler runs off-course</td><td>Invisible barriers prevent exit; handler is constrained to course boundary.</td></tr><tr><td>Handler collides with obstacle</td><td>Handler slides along obstacle collision; no stuck states.</td></tr><tr><td>Handler sprints into dog</td><td>No collision between handler and dog (non-physical); handler passes through or dog dodges.</td></tr><tr><td>Command issued while dog committed</td><td>Dog AI acknowledges but may not act; command queue behavior defined by dog state.</td></tr><tr><td>Voice input unrecognized</td><td>Display "unclear" indicator; no command issued.</td></tr><tr><td>Input device disconnected mid-run</td><td>Pause prompt; allow reconnection or controller swap.</td></tr><tr><td>Multiple commands rapid-fire</td><td>Commands queue with timestamp; dog AI processes in order with timing windows.</td></tr></tbody></table><hr><h3>2.1.7
