hardware.</td><td>P0</td></tr><tr><td>PF-F002</td><td>Game must maintain 30fps on minimum spec hardware.</td><td>P0</td></tr><tr><td>PF-F003</td><td>Game must provide graphics presets: Low, Medium, High, Ultra.</td><td>P0</td></tr><tr><td>PF-F004</td><td>Game must provide individual graphics settings: shadow quality, texture quality, crowd density, particle quality, AA, vsync.</td><td>P1</td></tr><tr><td>PF-F005</td><td>Game must load from main menu to gameplay within 15 seconds on recommended spec.</td><td>P0</td></tr><tr><td>PF-F006</td><td>Game must detect hardware and auto-select appropriate preset on first launch.</td><td>P1</td></tr></tbody></table><hr><h3>2.13.4 Non-Functional Requirements</h3><table><thead><tr><th>ID</th><th>Requirement</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>PF-NF001</td><td>Frame time variance must not exceed 5ms (no micro-stutter).</td></tr><tr><td>PF-NF002</td><td>Memory usage must not exceed 4GB RAM on minimum spec.</td></tr><tr><td>PF-NF003</td><td>GPU memory usage must not exceed 2GB VRAM on minimum spec.</td></tr><tr><td>PF-NF004</td><td>Install size must not exceed 15GB for v1.</td></tr></tbody></table><hr><h3>2.13.5 Platform Specifications</h3><table><thead><tr><th>Platform</th><th>Minimum Spec</th><th>Recommended Spec</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>Windows</td><td>i5-6400, GTX 960, 8GB RAM, DX11</td><td>i7-8700, RTX 2060, 16GB RAM, DX12</td></tr><tr><td>macOS</td><td>M1, 8GB RAM</td><td>M1 Pro/Max, 16GB RAM</td></tr><tr><td>WebGL</td><td>Chrome 90+, WebGL 2.0, 8GB RAM</td><td>Chrome 100+, WebGL 2.0, 16GB RAM</td></tr></tbody></table><hr><h3>2.13.6 Performance Budgets</h3><table><thead><tr><th>System</th><th>Frame Budget (60fps)</th><th>Memory Budget</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>Dog AI</td><td>2ms</td><td>10MB</td></tr><tr><td>Obstacle System</td><td>1ms</td><td>5MB</td></tr><tr><td>Camera</td><td>1ms</td><td>5MB</td></tr><tr><td>Crowd</td><td>3ms</td><td>50MB textures</td></tr><tr><td>Audio</td><td>1ms</td><td>100MB</td></tr><tr><td>UI</td><td>1ms</td><td>20MB</td></tr><tr><td>Total Gameplay</td><td>16ms (one frame)</td><td>4GB total</td></tr></tbody></table><hr><h3>2.13.7 Acceptance Criteria</h3><table><thead><tr><th>ID</th><th>Criterion</th><th>Verification</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>PF-AC001</td><td>Game maintains 60fps on recommended spec during gameplay.</td><td>Profiler test on recommended hardware.</td></tr><tr><td>PF-AC002</td><td>Game maintains 30fps on minimum spec during gameplay.</td><td>Profiler test on minimum hardware.</td></tr><tr><td>PF-AC003</td><td>No frame time variance &gt;5ms during steady gameplay.</td><td>Frame time capture over 60-second run.</td></tr><tr><td>PF-AC004</td><td>Load time within spec.</td><td>Instrumented load test.</td></tr><tr><td>PF-AC005</td><td>WebGL prototype maintains 30fps in browser.</td><td>Browser profiler test.</td></tr></tbody></table><hr><h1>3. Unity Technical Architecture</h1><hr><h2>3.1 Assembly / Module Breakdown</h2><p>The codebase is organized into logical assemblies for modularity, testability, and compilation efficiency.</p></div> <p dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">/com.company.wam.core
  /Events
  /Data
  /Utilities
  /Services </p><div class=""></div><p dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">/com.company.wam.gameplay
  /Handler

  /Obstacles

  /Commands </p><div class=""></div><p dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">/com.company.wam.presentation
  /Camera

  /Crowd

  /Career

  /Records </p><div class=""></div><p dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">/com.company.wam.online
  /Leaderboards

  /Ghosts </p><div class=""></div><p dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">/com.company.wam.audio
  /SpatialAudio

  /Settings
  /VisualAids </p><div class=""></div><p dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">/com.company.wam.tools (Editor Only)
  /CourseEditor
  /Validation
  /DebugVisualizers </p><div class="relative my-2 flex flex-col rounded-xl border border-[#0000000A] bg-[#F7F7F7] dark:bg-[#202123] p-2" dir="ltr"><div class="absolute pl-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium text-text-300 dark:text-white">text</div> <div class="sticky top-8 mb-1 flex items-center justify-end z-11 text-xs text-black dark:text-white"><div class="flex items-center gap-0.5 translate-y-[1px]">  <div aria-label="Copy" class="flex"><button class="p-1.5 bg-none rounded-md border-none transition copy-code-button hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-800"><svg class="size-4" stroke-width="1.677" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M12.668 10.667C12.668 9.95614 12.668 9.46258 12.6367 9.0791C12.6137 8.79732 12.5758 8.60761 12.5244 8.46387L12.4688 class="cm-line">## 3.2 Major Gameplay Systems</div><div class="cm-line"><br></div><div class="cm-line">### 3.2.1 Core Game Loop</div><div class="cm-line"><br></div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-layer-above cm-cursorLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: 150; animation-duration: 1200ms;"><div class="cm-cursor cm-cursor-primary" style="left: 6px; top: 5px; height: 16px;"></div></div><div │                      Game Flow                               │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  MainMenu → ModeSelect → TeamSelect → CourseLoad →          │
│  Countdown → Gameplay → RunComplete → Results → Replay      │
│       ↓                                                      │
│  Career → EventSelect → TeamSelect → ...                    │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ </p><div class="relative my-2 flex flex-col rounded-xl border border-[#0000000A] bg-[#F7F7F7] dark:bg-[#202123] p-2" dir="ltr"><div w-full"><div class="cm-editor ͼ1 ͼ2 ͼ4 ͼ9d ͼ5k"><div class="cm-announced" aria-live="polite"></div><div tabindex="-1" class="cm-scroller"><div spellcheck="false" autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="off" writingsuggestions="false" translate="no" contenteditable="false" class="cm-content" role="textbox" aria-multiline="true" style="tab-size: 4;"><div class="cm-line"><br></div><div class="cm-line">---</div><div class="cm-line"><br></div><div class="cm-line">## 3.3 Key Classes / Components / Managers</div><div class="cm-line"><br></div><div class="cm-line">### 3.3.1 HandlerController</div><div class="cm-line"><br></div><div class="cm-line">**Responsibility:** Manages handler locomotion, input processing, and body state.</div><div class="cm-line"><br></div><div class="cm-line">```csharp</div><div class="cm-line">public class HandlerController : MonoBehaviour</div><div class="cm-line">{</div><div class="cm-line">    // Configuration</div><div class="cm-line">    [SerializeField] private HandlerData _data;</div><div class="cm-line">    [SerializeField] private HandlerAnimationController _animationController;</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    // State</div><div class="cm-line">    public Vector3 Position =&gt; transform.position;</div><div class="cm-line">    public Vector3 Velocity { get; private set; }</div><div class="cm-line">    public Vector3 Facing { get; private set; }</div><div class="cm-line">    public float Speed =&gt; Velocity.magnitude;</div><div class="cm-line">    public bool IsSprinting { get; private set; }</div><div class="cm-line">    public ArmGesture CurrentGesture { get; private set; }</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    // Methods</div><div class="cm-line">    public void SetMovementInput(Vector2 input);</div><div class="cm-line">    public void SetSprint(bool sprinting);</div><div class="cm-line">    public void SetFacingInput(Vector2 input);</div><div class="cm-line">    public void IssueGesture(ArmGesture gesture);</div><div class="cm-line">    public void IssueCommand(CommandType command);</div><div class="cm-line">    </div><div class="cm-line">    // Events</div><div class="cm-line">    public event Action&lt;CommandIssuedEventArgs&gt; OnCommandIssued;</div><div class="cm-line">    public event Action&lt;GestureEventArgs&gt; OnGestureChanged;</div><div class="cm-line">}</div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-layer-above cm-cursorLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: 150; animation-duration: 1200ms; animation-name: cm-blink;"><div class="cm-cursor cm-cursor-primary" style="left: 14.428711px; top: 651px; height: 16px;"></div></div><div class="cm-layer cm-selectionLayer" aria-hidden="true" style="z-index: -2;"></div></div></div></div></div> <div id="plt-canvas-62bd352f-e53d-485a-8f09-7de1e67d01f6-18" class="bg-gray-50 dark:bg-[#202123] dark:text-white max-w-full overflow-x-auto scrollbar-hidden"></div> </div> <div class=""></div><hr class="border-[#EBEBEB] dark:border-[#EBEBEB]/16"><h3 dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c">3.3.2 DogAgentController </h3><p dir="auto" class="svelte-121hp7c"><strong>Responsibility:</strong> Core dog AI: perception, decision-making, state management, and movement. </p><div class=""></div><div class="relative my-2 flex flex-col rounded-xl border border-[#0000000A] bg-[#F7F7F7] dark:bg-[#202123] p-2" dir="ltr"><div class="absolute pl-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium text-text-300 dark:text-white">csharp</div> <div class="sticky
